yang_wood.title: The Towering Oak — Born to Lead
yang_wood.desc: You carry the energy of a mighty oak reaching toward the sky. You're a natural-born leader — honest, driven, and once you commit, nothing can shake your resolve. Like a great tree, you provide shelter and strength to everyone around you.

yin_wood.title: The Winding Vine — Flexible and Unbreakable
yin_wood.desc: You have the spirit of a vine that bends but never breaks. On the surface you seem gentle, but underneath lies incredible inner strength. You're creative, artistically gifted, and you truly shine when collaborating with others.

yang_fire.title: The Blazing Sun — Radiant and Unstoppable
yang_fire.desc: You carry the fiery energy of the midday sun. Passionate and overflowing with vitality, you're straightforward with zero grudges. You naturally become the center of any gathering, spreading positivity everywhere you go.

yin_fire.title: The Candlelight — Warm and Deeply Focused
yin_fire.desc: You carry the gentle glow of a candle in the dark. Delicate and devoted, you may seem quiet on the outside, but inside burns an intense passion. Your analytical and meticulous nature makes you stand out in any specialized field.

yang_earth.title: The Mountain — Steady and Immovable
yang_earth.desc: You carry the grounding energy of a vast mountain. Trustworthy and deeply charismatic, you value integrity above all else. Your ability to mediate conflicts and embrace others makes you a pillar that people instinctively lean on.

yin_earth.title: The Garden Soil — Nurturing Everything to Life
yin_earth.desc: You carry the fertile energy of rich garden soil. Compassionate with a strong nurturing instinct, you have a gift for practical, real-world thinking. You find deep fulfillment in caring for others and helping them grow.

yang_metal.title: The Sword — Decisive and Unyielding
yang_metal.desc: You carry the sharp energy of forged steel. Decisive and fiercely loyal, you see things in black and white. Once you lock onto a goal, you charge forward like a bulldozer. You're a charismatic leader who commands respect.

yin_metal.title: The Jewel — Precise and Brilliant
yin_metal.desc: You carry the refined energy of a polished gemstone. Clean, precise, with extraordinary aesthetic sensibility. Your sharp intuition and relentless self-discipline drive you toward perfection, and your work reflects it.

yang_water.title: The Ocean — Vast and Infinitely Deep
yang_water.desc: You carry the wisdom of the deep ocean. Thoughtful and resourceful, you see the world through a wide-angle lens. Sometimes you crash forward like powerful waves, other times you reflect like a still lake — always revealing profound insight.

yin_water.title: The Morning Dew — Gentle and Deeply Intuitive
yin_water.desc: You carry the quiet power of morning dew that nourishes everything it touches. Brilliant and adaptable, you have an uncanny ability to read people's emotions. You transform yourself to fit any situation, and your thoughtful care moves everyone around you.

synergy_base.E: Your extroverted energy perfectly aligns with the expanding, outward-flowing Yang force — the nature of Wood and Fire. You recharge by interacting with people and the world around you, radiating your energy outward in brilliant bursts.
synergy_base.I: Your introverted energy resonates with the inward-gathering Yin force — the nature of Metal and Water. You recharge through quiet self-reflection and solitude, drawing power from your rich inner world.
synergy_base.S: Your five-senses-grounded nature corresponds to Earth energy — steady, unchanging, firmly rooted. You trust what you can see, measure, and verify. Stability isn't boring to you; it's the foundation of everything real.
synergy_base.N: Your intuition-driven nature aligns with Wood energy — endlessly reaching upward toward new possibilities. You chase hidden patterns and big-picture connections that others miss. You're an idealist and a creative visionary at heart.
synergy_base.T: Your logic-first approach perfectly matches Metal energy — cold, sharp, and cutting through noise. You don't let personal feelings cloud your judgment. You call things as they are and make decisions with razor-sharp clarity.
synergy_base.F: Your empathy-first approach deeply connects with Fire energy — warming everything around you. You prioritize social harmony and emotional connection, bringing warmth and compassion to every relationship.
synergy_base.J: Your need for structure and control reflects a blend of Metal's strict organization and Water's strategic wisdom. You create systems, follow through on plans, and bring order to chaos.
synergy_base.P: Your fluid adaptability mirrors Water energy — constantly changing shape to fit whatever container life offers. Rather than forcing rigid plans, you go with the flow and adapt brilliantly to whatever comes your way.

self_identity.title: Self & Independence
self_identity.desc: This mirrors MBTI's Introverted Thinking (Ti) or Introverted Feeling (Fi) — standing firm in your own logical truth or moral values without bending to external pressure.

creative_expression.title: Creativity & Expression
creative_expression.desc: This connects to Introverted Sensing (Si) that preserves past experiences, Extraverted Feeling (Fe) that seeks warm connection, Extraverted Intuition (Ne) that generates endless possibilities, or Extraverted Thinking (Te) that tackles logical problems head-on.

wealth_control.title: Ambition & Resource Control
wealth_control.desc: This links to Introverted Sensing (Si) grounded in real data, Extraverted Thinking (Te) that sets clear boundaries and rational goals, Extraverted Intuition (Ne) that explores possibilities, and Extraverted Sensing (Se) that directly commands the environment.

authority_discipline.title: Discipline & Social Responsibility
authority_discipline.desc: This resembles Extraverted Feeling (Fe) building community harmony, Extraverted Thinking (Te) establishing clear social rules, or Introverted Intuition (Ni) breaking through crises with deep foresight — blended with decisive judgment.

wisdom_intuition.title: Wisdom & Spiritual Receptivity
wisdom_intuition.desc: This most closely matches Introverted Feeling (Fi) with its deep human understanding, Introverted Sensing (Si) that stores universal truths, and Introverted Intuition (Ni) that extracts core insights from fragmented information.

ISTJ.keywords: The Salt of the Earth, Meticulous Logician, Duty-Bound
ISTJ.core_energy: Earth + Metal / Direct Wealth + Direct Authority
ISTJ.desc: You stand firmly on unshakable Earth, wielding the precise tools of Metal. You embody the perfect balance of Direct Wealth — managing every detail with practical precision — and Direct Authority — upholding rules and dedicating yourself to the organization with unwavering commitment.

INFP.keywords: The Passionate Idealist, Inner Fire, Deep Feeler
INFP.core_energy: Water + Wood / Indirect Wisdom + Creative Flow
INFP.desc: Like a tender sprout carefully nurtured from a deep, still well — your Indirect Wisdom gives you powerful intuition to explore unseen philosophies, while your Creative Flow transforms complex emotions into art, writing, and beauty.

ENFP.keywords: The Spark Plug, Idea Machine, Energy Everywhere
ENFP.core_energy: Wood + Fire / Bold Expression + Indirect Wealth
ENFP.desc: Like wildfire spreading across a spring meadow — you radiate powerful Wood and Fire energy in every direction. Your Bold Expression breaks every mold with free-flowing imagination, while your Indirect Wealth thrives on networking and controlling your environment.

INFJ.core_energy: Yin Fire / Indirect Wisdom + Direct Authority
INFJ.desc: Your Indirect Wisdom (Ni) is overwhelmingly developed, giving you the ability to see through the surface of things. You dedicate this gift to harmony and upholding righteous social values (Direct Authority/Fe). Calm on the outside, but inside burns an idealistic flame.

ESTJ.core_energy: Yang Metal / Indirect Authority + Direct Wealth
ESTJ.desc: Like a great axe or refined steel — you cut through injustice and inefficiency without hesitation. Your Indirect Authority (Te) commands organizations through crises with unmatched charisma, while your Direct Wealth (Si) precisely tracks and manages tangible results.

compatibility_data.guideline: Reducing human relationships to four letters is dangerously oversimplistic. True compatibility depends on whether your partner naturally provides the elemental energy you lack. Even clashing energies can become healthy catalysts that challenge you to grow.

yang_wood.desc: You have the best chemistry with people who support and champion your growth.

yin_wood.desc: You click with types who spark your creativity and wrap you in gentle understanding.

yang_fire.desc: Your energy matches with action-oriented types who enjoy life in the moment with you.

yin_fire.desc: You build deep trust with types who offer stability and thoughtful care.

yang_earth.desc: You complement types who offer fresh perspectives and intellectual stimulation.

yin_earth.desc: You thrive with emotionally rich types who share life's simple joys with you.

yang_metal.desc: You need partners who share a clear vision and charge toward goals alongside you.

yin_metal.desc: You trust types who are precise, responsible, and match your standards.

yang_water.desc: You're a perfect match with types who appreciate your depth and bring joyful stimulation.

yin_water.desc: You harmonize beautifully with types who share deep emotional connection and mutual growth.

yang_wood_ISTJ.title: Iron Fortress on Ancient Roots
yang_wood_ISTJ.desc: The Oak's natural leadership meets ISTJ's unwavering sense of duty. Once you set a goal, you pursue it with unshakable willpower. Spontaneity is rare for you — steady, planned progress is your highest virtue. In any organization, you earn trust through actions, not words, quietly building results as the dependable pillar everyone relies on.
yang_wood_ISTJ.strength: Unshakable execution and accountability, long-term goal achievement
yang_wood_ISTJ.weakness: Resistance to change, rigidity that may cause you to miss new opportunities
yang_wood_ISTJ.career: Government official, attorney, architect, military officer, corporate management
yang_wood_ISTJ.growth_tip: Sometimes put the plan aside and let a spontaneous experience broaden your world.

yang_wood_ISFJ.title: A Warm Nest in a Mighty Tree
yang_wood_ISFJ.desc: The Oak's fierce drive combined with ISFJ's devoted care makes you a protector-type leader who quietly but surely shields those around you. You look strong on the outside, but inside lies deep warmth. In a crisis, you're the first one by someone's side. You unleash your most powerful energy when making decisions for others rather than yourself.
yang_wood_ISFJ.strength: Balance of strong drive and gentle care, crisis management ability
yang_wood_ISFJ.weakness: Burnout from excessive self-sacrifice, difficulty saying no
yang_wood_ISFJ.career: Nurse, social worker, teacher, physician, counselor
yang_wood_ISFJ.growth_tip: You have to fill your own cup before you can fill anyone else's. Put self-care first.

yang_wood_INFJ.title: The Visionary Oak That Sees Tomorrow
yang_wood_INFJ.desc: The Oak's upright leadership meets INFJ's profound insight. You're a pioneer who sees futures others can't and walks steadily toward them. You lead by vision, not words, and once you believe in a value, no amount of pressure can bend you. Helping others grow gives you the deepest sense of purpose.
yang_wood_INFJ.strength: Insightful leadership, values-driven decisions, long-term vision
yang_wood_INFJ.weakness: Perfectionism causing delays, tendency to carry everything alone
yang_wood_INFJ.career: Author, psychologist, spiritual leader, activist, strategist
yang_wood_INFJ.growth_tip: An imperfect start creates more change than a perfect plan. Just begin.

yang_wood_INTJ.title: The Strategist Who Rules the Forest
yang_wood_INTJ.desc: The Oak's overwhelming drive meets INTJ's surgical strategic thinking. You're a systems-level leader who takes the shortest, cleanest path to any goal. Logic over emotion, data over instinct — once you design a plan, you execute without wavering. You have the innovator's instinct to reshape entire industries.
yang_wood_INTJ.strength: Long-term strategy, independent execution, systems design
yang_wood_INTJ.weakness: Overlooking others' emotions, preferring solo work over teamwork
yang_wood_INTJ.career: CEO, strategy consultant, scientist, systems architect, investor
yang_wood_INTJ.growth_tip: Even the best strategy needs human buy-in to succeed. Invest in emotional intelligence.

yang_wood_ISTP.title: The Silent Lumberjack with an Axe
yang_wood_ISTP.desc: The Oak's raw strength meets ISTP's cool analysis. When faced with a problem, you go silent and solve it through action. You cut through complexity to find the core issue and fix it — no wasted emotion, just results. You shine brightest in a crisis.
yang_wood_ISTP.strength: Crisis response, practical problem-solving, accurate situational reads
yang_wood_ISTP.weakness: Lack of long-term planning, bluntness in relationships
yang_wood_ISTP.growth_tip: Practice expressing what's inside you. It will transform the depth of your relationships.

yang_wood_ISFP.title: The Mighty Tree with Hidden Flowers
yang_wood_ISFP.desc: The Oak's strength coexists with ISFP's delicate sensitivity. You look tough on the outside, but you treasure a beautiful inner world. When your work aligns with your values, you unlock explosive focus and creativity. Nature and art are your deepest sources of comfort.
yang_wood_ISFP.strength: Strong values, exceptional aesthetic sense, quiet devotion
yang_wood_ISFP.weakness: Conflict avoidance, being misunderstood due to lack of self-expression
yang_wood_ISFP.growth_tip: Let your beautiful inner world show. The world needs to see it.

yang_wood_INFP.title: The Lone Tree Walking Toward an Ideal
yang_wood_INFP.desc: The Oak's unyielding will meets INFP's deep idealism. No matter what the world says, you hold onto your beliefs and keep walking. You chase meaning over material success, and you're most yourself when expressing your complex inner world through writing or art.
yang_wood_INFP.strength: Deep idealism, strong inner conviction, rich creativity
yang_wood_INFP.weakness: Disconnect from practical reality, frustration when ideals don't match the real world
yang_wood_INFP.career: Writer, poet, counselor, social activist, educator
yang_wood_INFP.growth_tip: The best way to make your ideals real is to take one small step today.

yang_wood_INTP.title: The Philosopher Tree Exploring the Forest of Knowledge
yang_wood_INTP.desc: The Oak's independent spirit meets INTP's logical curiosity. You find the greatest joy in understanding how the world works. You have a gift for reconstructing complex concepts in your own unique way and regularly challenge conventional thinking with original ideas.
yang_wood_INTP.strength: Deep analysis, original thinking, complex problem-solving
yang_wood_INTP.weakness: Weak follow-through, tendency to stay in theory
yang_wood_INTP.growth_tip: Stop thinking and start doing — begin with the smallest possible action right now.

yang_wood_ESTP.title: The Powerhouse Who Commands Any Stage
yang_wood_ESTP.desc: The Oak's charisma meets ESTP's explosive action. You're a natural competitor who seizes control and delivers results in any situation. You prefer the field over theory, action over planning, and the more dangerous the situation, the more alive you feel.
yang_wood_ESTP.strength: Instant action, strong persuasion, leadership under pressure
yang_wood_ESTP.weakness: Lack of long-range planning, regret from impulsive decisions
yang_wood_ESTP.career: Sales executive, entrepreneur, athlete, actor, trader
yang_wood_ESTP.growth_tip: Add long-term vision to your fast execution, and nothing can stop you.

yang_wood_ESFP.title: The Giant Tree on Center Stage
yang_wood_ESFP.desc: The Oak's commanding presence meets ESFP's bright, vibrant energy. Wherever you go, you change the atmosphere. You genuinely enjoy being with people, leaving spontaneous but powerful impressions. Whether on a literal stage or in everyday life, you're naturally the main character.
yang_wood_ESFP.strength: Commanding presence, natural leadership, magnetic charm
yang_wood_ESFP.weakness: Focus on the present over future planning, boredom with routine
yang_wood_ESFP.career: Entertainer, event planner, sales manager, coach, speaker
yang_wood_ESFP.growth_tip: Connect your present-moment energy to future goals — that's where real magic happens.

yang_wood_ENFP.title: The Passion Tree That Changes the World
yang_wood_ENFP.desc: The Oak's relentless drive meets ENFP's explosive creativity. Together, they make an innovator who actually brings impossible ideas to life. Your eye for possibility is extraordinary, and inspiring others with your vision comes naturally. The challenge? Finishing what you start.
yang_wood_ENFP.strength: Bold vision, creative execution, ability to inspire
yang_wood_ENFP.weakness: Attention scatters before projects are complete
yang_wood_ENFP.career: Startup founder, content creator, marketer, author, keynote speaker
yang_wood_ENFP.growth_tip: The power to finish your ideas is what will truly show the world your strength.

yang_wood_ENTP.title: The Forest King Who Loves a Good Debate
yang_wood_ENTP.desc: The Oak's firm will meets ENTP's razor-sharp logic and challenger spirit. You get a thrill from breaking established norms. You can analyze any topic from multiple angles, often surprising even yourself with the ideas you generate. In debate and persuasion, you're unmatched.
yang_wood_ENTP.strength: Creative problem-solving, powerful logic, disruptive ideas
yang_wood_ENTP.weakness: Scattered energy across too many interests
yang_wood_ENTP.career: Lawyer, entrepreneur, consultant, inventor, media personality
yang_wood_ENTP.growth_tip: Instead of challenging everything, go deep on one thing. That's where real results live.

yang_wood_ESTJ.title: The Iron Tree That Commands Armies
yang_wood_ESTJ.desc: The Oak's natural leadership meets ESTJ's organizational dominance. You naturally rise to leadership in any group. You value efficiency and rules, and nothing satisfies you more than driving an organization toward a goal and delivering results.
yang_wood_ESTJ.strength: Exceptional organizational skills, strong execution, clear goal-setting
yang_wood_ESTJ.weakness: Inflexibility, low tolerance for opposing views
yang_wood_ESTJ.career: Executive, military officer, judge, politician, management
yang_wood_ESTJ.growth_tip: When warm empathy joins your strong leadership, people follow you with their hearts.

yang_wood_ESFJ.title: The Great Tree That Protects the Village
yang_wood_ESFJ.desc: The Oak's strength meets ESFJ's devoted community spirit. You're the reliable pillar who willingly sacrifices for your group. You sense people's needs with remarkable accuracy and find deep fulfillment in providing practical help while uniting the team.
yang_wood_ESFJ.strength: Community dedication, strong relationships, practical helpfulness
yang_wood_ESFJ.weakness: Dependence on others' approval, difficulty asserting yourself
yang_wood_ESFJ.career: Teacher, social worker, healthcare provider, HR specialist, administrator
yang_wood_ESFJ.growth_tip: Your needs matter just as much as everyone else's. Take care of yourself too.

yang_wood_ENFJ.title: The Tree That Makes Others Bloom
yang_wood_ENFJ.desc: The Oak's leadership meets ENFJ's charismatic empathy. Together they create an inspirational leader who unlocks people's hidden potential. Your ability to cast a vision and draw people into it is extraordinary. Other people's growth brings you more joy than your own success.
yang_wood_ENFJ.strength: Inspirational leadership, deep empathy, team motivation
yang_wood_ENFJ.weakness: Risk of losing yourself in excessive focus on others
yang_wood_ENFJ.growth_tip: You shine brightest when you grow together with others. Trust that power.

yang_wood_ENTJ.title: The King's Tree That Rules the World
yang_wood_ENTJ.desc: Yang Wood plus ENTJ — this is the ultimate born leader. Vision, strategy, drive, and charisma — you have it all. You can lead any organization and achieve any goal. You draw your deepest energy from painting the big picture and making it real.
yang_wood_ENTJ.strength: Natural-born leadership, powerful strategic thinking, overwhelming execution
yang_wood_ENTJ.weakness: Control issues, tendency to dismiss others' contributions
yang_wood_ENTJ.career: CEO, political leader, general, investor, founder
yang_wood_ENTJ.growth_tip: The greatest leaders know how to win together, not alone.

yin_wood_ISTJ.title: The Grass That Outlasts Every Storm
yin_wood_ISTJ.desc: The Vine's flexible life force meets ISTJ's thorough diligence. You may not be the loudest in the room, but you last the longest and stay the steadiest. Beneath a gentle exterior, you treat rules and responsibility as sacred, building trust that no one can rival.
yin_wood_ISTJ.strength: Incredible patience, meticulous responsibility, long-term trust building
yin_wood_ISTJ.weakness: Slow to adapt, reluctant to try new things
yin_wood_ISTJ.career: Accountant, librarian, administrator, civil servant, pharmacist
yin_wood_ISTJ.growth_tip: Moving before you feel perfectly ready can bring you more than waiting ever will.

yin_wood_ISFJ.title: The Meadow Grass That Quietly Tends the World
yin_wood_ISFJ.desc: The Vine's delicate sensitivity meets ISFJ's warm caregiving. You're the embodiment of devotion — silently standing by and tending to others with extraordinary attention. Your sharp memory and observation move people deeply.
yin_wood_ISFJ.strength: Thoughtful consideration, remarkable memory, unwavering devotion
yin_wood_ISFJ.weakness: Depleted from always putting others first
yin_wood_ISFJ.career: Nurse, childcare teacher, counselor, librarian, family physician
yin_wood_ISFJ.growth_tip: Your sensitivity is one of the world's rarest gifts. Give some of that care to yourself too.

yin_wood_INFJ.title: The Quiet Sage in the Meadow
yin_wood_INFJ.desc: The Vine's quiet life force meets INFJ's mystical insight. You intuitively read the flow of the world that others miss entirely. You say little, but when you speak, you strike at the core truth with startling precision.
yin_wood_INFJ.strength: Deep insight, quiet influence, ability to cast vision
yin_wood_INFJ.career: Counselor, writer, spiritual leader, researcher, strategist
yin_wood_INFJ.growth_tip: Express your vision through small actions. Watch the world change around you.

yin_wood_INTJ.title: The Quiet Strategist Taking Root
yin_wood_INTJ.desc: The Vine's flexible survival instinct meets INTJ's cold strategic mind. You look quiet on the outside, but inside you're designing and executing meticulous plans. You appear only when needed, but at the decisive moment, your influence is the strongest in the room.
yin_wood_INTJ.strength: Meticulous strategy, quiet but powerful execution
yin_wood_INTJ.weakness: Lack of emotional expression, tendency to decide and execute alone
yin_wood_INTJ.career: Strategy planner, data analyst, researcher, writer, investor
yin_wood_INTJ.growth_tip: Share your strategy with others. The results get stronger when others are in the loop.

yin_wood_ISTP.title: The Artisan Who Reads the Wind
yin_wood_ISTP.desc: The Vine's adaptability meets ISTP's practical analysis. You morph yourself to fit any situation and find the most efficient solution. Your hands move before your mouth does — you learn by touching, taking apart, and rebuilding things.
yin_wood_ISTP.strength: Outstanding adaptability, practical problem-solving, skilled hands
yin_wood_ISTP.weakness: Weak emotional communication, relationships may stay shallow
yin_wood_ISTP.career: Technician, chef, surgeon, auto mechanic, programmer
yin_wood_ISTP.growth_tip: Find ways to share the things your hands create with the world.

yin_wood_ISFP.title: The Wildflower in the Breeze
yin_wood_ISFP.desc: The Vine's delicate sensitivity meets ISFP's free artistic soul. You find life's meaning in sensing and creating beauty. You bloom brightest in freedom, growing at your own pace and in your own direction.
yin_wood_ISFP.strength: Exceptional aesthetic sense, deep emotions, free creativity
yin_wood_ISFP.weakness: Lack of planning, difficulty setting realistic goals
yin_wood_ISFP.career: Illustrator, musician, fashion designer, photographer, florist
yin_wood_ISFP.growth_tip: Build a bridge between your artistic soul and the world. That becomes your personal brand.

yin_wood_INFP.title: The Dew-Kissed Poet of the Fields
yin_wood_INFP.desc: The Vine's rich inner world meets INFP's idealistic soul. You possess a one-of-a-kind sensibility and worldview that exists nowhere else. You shine brightest when channeling your complex inner life into writing or art. Authenticity is your greatest weapon.
yin_wood_INFP.strength: Deep emotion, unique worldview, authentic expression
yin_wood_INFP.weakness: Disconnect from reality, lack of execution power
yin_wood_INFP.career: Poet, novelist, counselor, art therapist, educator
yin_wood_INFP.growth_tip: Sharing your inner world is the greatest gift you can give to the world.

yin_wood_INTP.title: The Quiet Philosopher Unraveling the Universe
yin_wood_INTP.desc: The Vine's flexible thinking meets INTP's logical exploration. You ask 'why?' about everything, quietly building your own knowledge system in solitude. Your analytical mind and creative ability to connect distant ideas are extraordinary.
yin_wood_INTP.strength: Deep analysis, creative connections, original theory-building
yin_wood_INTP.weakness: Weak execution, difficulty maintaining social relationships
yin_wood_INTP.career: Philosopher, software developer, mathematician, economist, writer
yin_wood_INTP.growth_tip: Take your ideas out of your notebook and throw them into the world. Your thoughts could change everything.

yin_wood_ESTP.title: The Wind-Runner Chasing the Win
yin_wood_ESTP.desc: The Vine's quick adaptability meets ESTP's explosive field instincts. You spot opportunities in real-time and act on them instantly — a natural entrepreneur's instinct. Flexibility and boldness coexist in this rare combination.
yin_wood_ESTP.career: Trader, sales executive, event planner, entrepreneur, actor
yin_wood_ESTP.growth_tip: Add strategic thinking to your fast judgment, and you can dominate any market.

yin_wood_ESFP.title: The Spring Rain That Brightens Everything
yin_wood_ESFP.desc: The Vine's gentle life force meets ESFP's bright, positive energy. Wherever you go, you lighten the mood and inject vitality into everyone around you. You're gifted in relationships, and you instinctively know how to enjoy life.
yin_wood_ESFP.strength: Outstanding social skills, positive energy, ability to enjoy the present
yin_wood_ESFP.weakness: Lack of future planning, easily bored by routine
yin_wood_ESFP.career: Entertainer, event planner, tour guide, coach, instructor
yin_wood_ESFP.growth_tip: When you connect today's joy to tomorrow's goals, your life becomes infinitely richer.

yin_wood_ENFP.title: The Dreamer Scattering Seeds of Possibility
yin_wood_ENFP.desc: The Vine's creative sensitivity meets ENFP's overflowing imagination. You find possibilities everywhere and inspire everyone around you like a human power plant. Ideas flow like a spring, and you love nothing more than building dreams with others.
yin_wood_ENFP.strength: Limitless creativity, powerful inspiration, rich relationships
yin_wood_ENFP.weakness: Energy scatters before finishing one thing
yin_wood_ENFP.career: Content creator, marketer, author, educator, entrepreneur
yin_wood_ENFP.growth_tip: Finish one of your ideas all the way through. That one finished thing changes your life.

yin_wood_ENTP.title: The Flexible Reed in a Storm of Ideas
yin_wood_ENTP.desc: The Vine's flexible thinking meets ENTP's sharp debating ability. You approach any topic from fresh angles with intellectual agility. You love smashing conventional thinking and get your deepest energy from creative discussions and idea exchanges.
yin_wood_ENTP.strength: Creative thinking, exceptional logic, innovative ideas
yin_wood_ENTP.weakness: Hard to focus on one thing, pile of unfinished projects
yin_wood_ENTP.career: Entrepreneur, consultant, inventor, media personality, lawyer
yin_wood_ENTP.growth_tip: Enjoy the challenge — but also discover the joy of finishing.

yin_wood_ESTJ.title: The Flexible Manager Leading with Grace
yin_wood_ESTJ.desc: The Vine's adaptability meets ESTJ's powerful execution. You lead with practical flexibility, adjusting tactics as needed while never losing sight of the target. Your balance of firmness and adaptability is your greatest asset.
yin_wood_ESTJ.career: Middle manager, project manager, principal, team lead, operations director
yin_wood_ESTJ.growth_tip: Flexibility is your most powerful leadership tool. Trust your team more.

yin_wood_ESFJ.title: The Warm Grass That Embraces Everyone
yin_wood_ESFJ.desc: The Vine's gentle life force meets ESFJ's community-centered values. You create environments where everyone feels they belong, tending to each person with remarkable care. Your ability to smoothly mediate conflicts and build harmony is exceptional.
yin_wood_ESFJ.strength: Strong empathy, community harmony, thoughtful consideration
yin_wood_ESFJ.weakness: Oversensitive to others' opinions, difficulty voicing your own views
yin_wood_ESFJ.career: Teacher, HR manager, social worker, event coordinator, counselor
yin_wood_ESFJ.growth_tip: Speak up about your own needs as much as you care for others'.

yin_wood_ENFJ.title: The Grass That Brings Spring
yin_wood_ENFJ.desc: The Vine's delicate sensitivity meets ENFJ's charismatic empathetic leadership. You gently open people's hearts and draw out their fullest potential. A single word or action from you can move entire teams.
yin_wood_ENFJ.strength: Deep empathy, inspirational leadership, team growth catalyst
yin_wood_ENFJ.weakness: Burnout from absorbing others' emotions too deeply
yin_wood_ENFJ.career: Coach, counselor, educator, community leader, marketer
yin_wood_ENFJ.growth_tip: You shine brightest when you grow alongside others.

yin_wood_ENTJ.title: The Vine Strategist Who Conquers Worlds
yin_wood_ENTJ.desc: The Vine's nimble adaptability meets ENTJ's dominant execution. In any environment, you seize control and drive results. Flexible yet decisive, gentle yet powerfully driven — this is a rare combination.
yin_wood_ENTJ.strength: Strategic flexibility, strong execution, situational adaptability
yin_wood_ENTJ.career: Executive, entrepreneur, strategy consultant, project leader
yin_wood_ENTJ.growth_tip: The balance of flexibility and drive is what makes you unstoppable.

yang_fire_ISTJ.title: The Sun Contained by Discipline
yang_fire_ISTJ.desc: The Sun's blazing energy meets ISTJ's strict discipline. You channel brilliant talent through systematic methodology, creating a relentless executor. You look energetic outside, but you move with careful planning and precision.
yang_fire_ISTJ.career: Military officer, firefighter, athlete, surgeon, construction manager
yang_fire_ISTJ.growth_tip: Don't let your passion get caged by plans. Take an unscripted risk once in a while.

yang_fire_ISFJ.title: The Warm Sun That Lights Your Way
yang_fire_ISFJ.desc: The Sun's bright energy meets ISFJ's devoted care. You seep into people's lives like gentle sunlight. Your straightforward, no-grudge personality paired with thoughtful attention makes you the most comforting person in any room.
yang_fire_ISFJ.strength: Warm energy, attentive care, deep dedication
yang_fire_ISFJ.weakness: Sometimes clumsy at expressing your own feelings
yang_fire_ISFJ.career: Healthcare provider, childcare teacher, counselor, hotelier, nutritionist
yang_fire_ISFJ.growth_tip: Allow yourself the same warmth you give everyone else.

yang_fire_INFJ.title: The Sun That Illuminates Inner Truth
yang_fire_INFJ.desc: The Sun's powerful presence meets INFJ's deep insight. You look beyond surfaces to essences, guiding others with your light like a spiritual compass. Your influence comes not from actions or words, but from your very presence.
yang_fire_INFJ.strength: Insight, strong vision, quiet but deep influence
yang_fire_INFJ.career: Counselor, writer, spiritual leader, philosopher, activist
yang_fire_INFJ.growth_tip: Don't be afraid to let your light reach the world.

yang_fire_INTJ.title: The Cold Sun — Passion Meets Precision
yang_fire_INTJ.desc: The Sun's passion meets INTJ's strategic coldness. You're a rare blend of burning inner fire and cool outer rationality. Your ability to set a vision and design the most efficient path to reach it is extraordinary.
yang_fire_INTJ.strength: Vision plus strategy, strong execution, original thinking
yang_fire_INTJ.career: Strategy planner, researcher, inventor, CEO, scientist
yang_fire_INTJ.growth_tip: The best strategy still needs human hearts to work.

yang_fire_ISTP.title: The Hot-Handed Field Master
yang_fire_ISTP.desc: The Sun's spontaneous passion meets ISTP's cold composure under fire. In a crisis, you move faster and more accurately than anyone. Theory bores you — you come alive in the field.
yang_fire_ISTP.strength: Outstanding crisis response, practical problem-solving, fast judgment
yang_fire_ISTP.career: Firefighter, pilot, surgeon, special forces, race car driver
yang_fire_ISTP.growth_tip: Add a long-term lens to your fast reflexes and you become unstoppable.

yang_fire_ISFP.title: The Flower Blooming in Sunlight
yang_fire_ISFP.desc: The Sun's bright energy meets ISFP's delicate artistic soul. You have a rare ability to feel and express the beauty of the world. In freedom, your creativity explodes.
yang_fire_ISFP.strength: Rich emotion, exceptional aesthetics, bright energy
yang_fire_ISFP.weakness: Weak planning, difficulty setting concrete goals
yang_fire_ISFP.growth_tip: Your sensitivity can become your brand. Show it to the world.

yang_fire_INFP.title: The Sun Poet Burning for an Ideal
yang_fire_INFP.desc: The Sun's fierce passion meets INFP's deep idealism. You carry a burning desire to make the world more beautiful. Against anything that violates your values, you resist more fiercely than anyone.
yang_fire_INFP.strength: Intense passion, deep idealism, creative sensitivity
yang_fire_INFP.growth_tip: When passion meets direction, you can move the world.

yang_fire_INTP.title: The Sun Forging New Worlds in a Furnace of Knowledge
yang_fire_INTP.desc: The Sun's passionate curiosity meets INTP's logical mind. You explore complex concepts with burning enthusiasm and build new theories from scratch. When something grabs your interest, your focus is limitless.
yang_fire_INTP.strength: Logical curiosity, creative theory-building, passionate concentration
yang_fire_INTP.weakness: Weak execution, interests scatter too widely
yang_fire_INTP.growth_tip: Build a channel to share your knowledge with the world.

yang_fire_ESTP.title: The Unstoppable Force in the Arena
yang_fire_ESTP.desc: The Sun's explosive energy meets ESTP's bold competitive instinct. You naturally become the star of any stage. You command the field, seize every moment's opportunity, and deliver results — spectacularly.
yang_fire_ESTP.strength: Electric energy, field dominance, fearless action
yang_fire_ESTP.career: Sales director, entrepreneur, professional athlete, entertainer, trader
yang_fire_ESTP.growth_tip: Channel your explosive energy into a clear destination — that's when you become legendary.

yang_fire_ESFP.title: The Sun That Turns Life into a Festival
yang_fire_ESFP.desc: The Sun's radiant energy meets ESFP's joy of living. You don't just light up a room — you are the room. People gravitate toward you, and you turn ordinary moments into celebrations. Your enthusiasm is genuinely contagious.
yang_fire_ESFP.strength: Infectious energy, natural entertainer, gift for creating joy
yang_fire_ESFP.weakness: Short-term focus, plans get sidelined by the moment
yang_fire_ESFP.career: Entertainer, event producer, hospitality manager, MC, influencer
yang_fire_ESFP.growth_tip: A party is great — but a party with purpose is unforgettable.

yang_fire_ENFP.title: The Wildfire of Inspiration
yang_fire_ENFP.desc: The Sun's raw power meets ENFP's boundless imagination. Ideas spread from you like wildfire. You see potential where no one else does and convince people to believe in visions that seem impossible. You start a hundred things — finishing them is your heroic quest.
yang_fire_ENFP.strength: Visionary inspiration, creative energy, people magnetism
yang_fire_ENFP.career: Startup founder, creative director, motivational speaker, producer, social entrepreneur
yang_fire_ENFP.growth_tip: The world doesn't need more ideas from you — it needs one idea, finished.

yang_fire_ENTP.title: The Debater on Fire
yang_fire_ENTP.desc: The Sun's fierce energy meets ENTP's razor intellect. You argue not to win but to discover truth — and you love every second of it. You challenge everything, turn assumptions upside down, and generate ideas that leave everyone stunned.
yang_fire_ENTP.strength: Intellectual firepower, innovative disruption, persuasive energy
yang_fire_ENTP.weakness: Burns through projects before completion, argumentative streak
yang_fire_ENTP.career: Trial lawyer, venture capitalist, tech founder, political commentator, inventor
yang_fire_ENTP.growth_tip: Direct that fire toward building something — destruction alone won't satisfy you forever.

yang_fire_ESTJ.title: The General Who Leads from the Front
yang_fire_ESTJ.desc: The Sun's commanding energy meets ESTJ's ironclad organizational power. You don't manage from behind a desk — you lead the charge yourself. Inefficiency personally offends you, and your team knows exactly what's expected at all times.
yang_fire_ESTJ.strength: Commanding authority, airtight systems, zero tolerance for mediocrity
yang_fire_ESTJ.career: COO, military commander, school principal, head of operations, politician
yang_fire_ESTJ.growth_tip: Respect earns you soldiers. Warmth earns you loyalty.

yang_fire_ESFJ.title: The Sun That Warms the Community
yang_fire_ESFJ.desc: The Sun's generosity meets ESFJ's social grace. You're the heart of every group — the one who organizes, includes, remembers birthdays, and makes sure no one feels left out. Your warmth isn't performative; it's who you are.
yang_fire_ESFJ.strength: Community builder, social glue, emotionally attuned
yang_fire_ESFJ.weakness: Crushed by criticism, struggles when excluded
yang_fire_ESFJ.career: Teacher, nonprofit director, event coordinator, hospital administrator, HR leader
yang_fire_ESFJ.growth_tip: You deserve to receive as much warmth as you give.

yang_fire_ENFJ.title: The Sun That Ignites Others' Potential
yang_fire_ENFJ.desc: The Sun's radiance meets ENFJ's mentoring instinct. You don't just lead — you transform people. Your ability to see what someone could become and help them get there is almost supernatural. People don't just follow you; they become better versions of themselves around you.
yang_fire_ENFJ.strength: Transformative leadership, emotional brilliance, vision casting
yang_fire_ENFJ.weakness: Savior complex, emotional exhaustion from over-investing
yang_fire_ENFJ.career: Executive coach, motivational speaker, dean, nonprofit founder, therapist
yang_fire_ENFJ.growth_tip: You can't set yourself on fire to keep others warm. Protect your flame.

yang_fire_ENTJ.title: The Sun Emperor — Blinding and Unstoppable
yang_fire_ENTJ.desc: Yang Fire meets ENTJ — pure force of nature. You command with the Sun's authority and ENTJ's strategic brilliance. You don't just set goals; you reshape reality to meet them. People either follow you or get out of the way.
yang_fire_ENTJ.strength: Supreme confidence, strategic dominance, visionary execution
yang_fire_ENTJ.weakness: Can be overwhelming, lonely at the top
yang_fire_ENTJ.career: CEO, head of state, four-star general, media mogul, venture builder
yang_fire_ENTJ.growth_tip: The sun that burns too hot destroys what it was meant to nurture. Learn to dim.

yin_fire_ISTJ.title: The Steady Flame Behind the Curtain
yin_fire_ISTJ.desc: The Candle's focused warmth meets ISTJ's methodical precision. You're not flashy, but your quiet dedication burns longer than any spotlight. You keep the systems running, the details perfect, and the promises kept — always.
yin_fire_ISTJ.strength: Sustained focus, meticulous reliability, quiet competence
yin_fire_ISTJ.weakness: Overly cautious, slow to embrace change
yin_fire_ISTJ.career: Quality analyst, archivist, financial auditor, lab technician, compliance officer
yin_fire_ISTJ.growth_tip: Your flame is steady — but sometimes it needs to flicker into something new.

yin_fire_ISFJ.title: The Nightlight That Never Goes Out
yin_fire_ISFJ.desc: The Candle's gentle warmth meets ISFJ's endless devotion. You're the person people call at 2 AM. Your care is constant, your memory for what matters to others is incredible, and your loyalty runs deeper than most people will ever know.
yin_fire_ISFJ.strength: Bottomless compassion, remarkable memory, silent reliability
yin_fire_ISFJ.weakness: Invisible sacrifice that leads to resentment over time
yin_fire_ISFJ.career: Nurse, therapist, museum curator, kindergarten teacher, veterinarian
yin_fire_ISFJ.growth_tip: You matter too. Say it out loud until you believe it.

yin_fire_INFJ.title: The Sacred Flame of Inner Knowing
yin_fire_INFJ.desc: The Candle's intimate glow meets INFJ's prophetic intuition. You see patterns and meanings that others won't understand for years. Your insights arrive like whispers from another dimension — quiet, certain, and almost always right.
yin_fire_INFJ.strength: Visionary intuition, spiritual depth, transformative wisdom
yin_fire_INFJ.weakness: Isolation from feeling misunderstood, paralysis by perfectionism
yin_fire_INFJ.career: Psychologist, author, spiritual director, documentary filmmaker, futurist
yin_fire_INFJ.growth_tip: Your vision doesn't need to be perfect to be shared. The world needs it now.

yin_fire_INTJ.title: The Laser — Small Flame, Surgical Precision
yin_fire_INTJ.desc: The Candle's focused intensity meets INTJ's calculating mind. You are precise, deliberate, and devastatingly effective. Where the Sun blasts everything, you target the exact pressure point. Your plans unfold like chess games — every move calculated three steps ahead.
yin_fire_INTJ.strength: Surgical strategy, focused execution, intellectual depth
yin_fire_INTJ.weakness: Cold exterior pushes people away, overcomplicates simple things
yin_fire_INTJ.career: Data scientist, cryptographer, neurosurgeon, chess master, patent attorney
yin_fire_INTJ.growth_tip: Not everything needs to be a chess game. Sometimes, just play.

yin_fire_ISTP.title: The Quiet Spark in the Workshop
yin_fire_ISTP.desc: The Candle's focused warmth meets ISTP's hands-on mastery. You work in silence, with precision tools and steady hands. You don't explain what you're doing — you just deliver finished results that speak for themselves.
yin_fire_ISTP.strength: Precision craftsmanship, calm focus, problem-solving under pressure
yin_fire_ISTP.weakness: Emotionally closed off, may seem aloof
yin_fire_ISTP.career: Watchmaker, forensic analyst, electrical engineer, tattoo artist, mechanic
yin_fire_ISTP.growth_tip: Let people into your workshop — literally and figuratively.

yin_fire_ISFP.title: The Candle Artist Painting with Light
yin_fire_ISFP.desc: The Candle's warm glow meets ISFP's free-spirited artistry. You create beauty in the most intimate, personal ways. Your art isn't for galleries or critics — it's for the soul. Every piece carries a quiet fire that resonates with anyone who slows down enough to notice.
yin_fire_ISFP.strength: Intimate artistry, emotional authenticity, sensory awareness
yin_fire_ISFP.career: Ceramicist, candlemaker, indie musician, calligrapher, interior stylist
yin_fire_ISFP.growth_tip: The things you create in private deserve an audience. Share one piece this week.

yin_fire_INFP.title: The Candle Vigil Keeper — Burning for What Matters
yin_fire_INFP.desc: The Candle's quiet fire meets INFP's fierce inner idealism. You hold vigil for the things that matter — justice, beauty, truth, love. You don't shout; you simply refuse to let the flame go out. Your writing and art carry the weight of genuine conviction.
yin_fire_INFP.strength: Unwavering values, poetic expression, deep emotional intelligence
yin_fire_INFP.weakness: Crushed when ideals are betrayed, struggles with practical demands
yin_fire_INFP.career: Poet, human rights advocate, hospice worker, indie filmmaker, journal publisher
yin_fire_INFP.growth_tip: Your ideals need legs. Pair every feeling with one concrete action.

yin_fire_INTP.title: The Candle in the Library — Burning Through the Night
yin_fire_INTP.desc: The Candle's focused flame meets INTP's insatiable curiosity. While the world sleeps, you're three hours deep into a research rabbit hole. You connect ideas that have never been connected before, building frameworks that others will use for decades.
yin_fire_INTP.strength: Deep focus, original frameworks, patient analysis
yin_fire_INTP.career: Research fellow, theoretical physicist, software architect, epistemologist, medical researcher
yin_fire_INTP.growth_tip: Knowledge unshared is knowledge unlived. Publish something.

yin_fire_ESTP.title: The Torch in the Dark — Quick and Bright
yin_fire_ESTP.desc: The Candle's intensity meets ESTP's lightning reflexes. You illuminate problems instantly and take action before anyone else has finished analyzing. You're the first responder, the closer, the one who gets it done when it actually matters.
yin_fire_ESTP.strength: Rapid assessment, fearless action, clutch performance
yin_fire_ESTP.weakness: Burns too fast, neglects recovery and reflection
yin_fire_ESTP.career: ER doctor, crisis negotiator, sports agent, nightlife entrepreneur, detective
yin_fire_ESTP.growth_tip: Burning bright is your gift — but even torches need to be refueled.

yin_fire_ESFP.title: The Birthday Candle — Small but Magical
yin_fire_ESFP.desc: The Candle's intimate warmth meets ESFP's celebratory spirit. You have a gift for making ordinary moments feel special. You're not the bonfire — you're the birthday candle that makes the wish come true. Your warmth is personal, memorable, and deeply felt.
yin_fire_ESFP.strength: Creating magic in small moments, genuine warmth, joyful presence
yin_fire_ESFP.weakness: Avoiding heavy topics, surface-level in serious situations
yin_fire_ESFP.career: Party planner, boutique owner, makeup artist, lifestyle blogger, cruise director
yin_fire_ESFP.growth_tip: Joy is your superpower — but depth makes it unforgettable.

yin_fire_ENFP.title: A Thousand Candles Lit by One
yin_fire_ENFP.desc: The Candle's warm glow meets ENFP's infectious enthusiasm. You don't light up a room — you light up other people, who then light up the room. Your influence spreads exponentially because you genuinely care about every person you meet.
yin_fire_ENFP.strength: Multiplying effect, genuine connections, emotional generosity
yin_fire_ENFP.weakness: Spread too thin, says yes to everyone
yin_fire_ENFP.career: Community organizer, brand ambassador, creative therapist, social media manager, camp counselor
yin_fire_ENFP.growth_tip: You can't light every candle. Choose the ones that matter most.

yin_fire_ENTP.title: The Candle That Questions the Dark
yin_fire_ENTP.desc: The Candle's persistent glow meets ENTP's questioning mind. You challenge darkness not with brute force but with probing questions that no one else thinks to ask. Your intellect is sharp but warm — you're not trying to win, you're trying to understand.
yin_fire_ENTP.strength: Thoughtful provocation, innovative questioning, warm intellect
yin_fire_ENTP.weakness: Restless, may abandon inquiry before reaching answers
yin_fire_ENTP.career: Science journalist, think tank fellow, product designer, debate coach, podcast host
yin_fire_ENTP.growth_tip: The best questions deserve answers. Stay with one until you crack it.

yin_fire_ESTJ.title: The Lighthouse Keeper — Steady Signal in the Dark
yin_fire_ESTJ.desc: The Candle's reliable glow meets ESTJ's systematic discipline. You keep the light on, every single night, no matter what. Systems, procedures, checklists — you maintain them with devotion because you know that one night without the light, someone gets lost.
yin_fire_ESTJ.strength: Unwavering reliability, systematic discipline, protective nature
yin_fire_ESTJ.weakness: Rigid about procedures, critical of those who don't follow protocol
yin_fire_ESTJ.career: Operations manager, air traffic controller, hospital administrator, safety inspector, regulatory officer
yin_fire_ESTJ.growth_tip: The lighthouse doesn't control the ships. Let people find their own way sometimes.

yin_fire_ESFJ.title: The Candle at the Family Table
yin_fire_ESFJ.desc: The Candle's warmth meets ESFJ's devotion to family and community. You're the one who keeps traditions alive, remembers anniversaries, and makes sure everyone feels at home. Your love language is showing up — consistently, warmly, without fail.
yin_fire_ESFJ.strength: Tradition keeper, emotional anchor, reliable warmth
yin_fire_ESFJ.weakness: Takes it personally when traditions are ignored or people don't show up
yin_fire_ESFJ.career: Family counselor, restaurant owner, wedding planner, school counselor, community center director
yin_fire_ESFJ.growth_tip: Not everyone shows love the way you do. That doesn't mean they love you less.

yin_fire_ENFJ.title: The Guiding Light That Transforms Lives
yin_fire_ENFJ.desc: The Candle's focused warmth meets ENFJ's gift for transformation. You don't just help people — you see who they could become and gently guide them there. Your mentorship leaves permanent marks on people's lives. They carry your light long after you've moved on.
yin_fire_ENFJ.strength: Life-changing mentorship, emotional brilliance, lasting impact
yin_fire_ENFJ.weakness: Emotional exhaustion, difficulty accepting you can't save everyone
yin_fire_ENFJ.career: Life coach, school principal, spiritual guide, nonprofit CEO, psychotherapist
yin_fire_ENFJ.growth_tip: You've changed enough lives to know this: you can't pour from an empty cup.

yin_fire_ENTJ.title: The Controlled Burn — Precise Power
yin_fire_ENTJ.desc: The Candle's focused intensity meets ENTJ's commanding ambition. You're not the loudest leader — you're the most precise one. You burn through problems with surgical focus while others are still gathering data. Your controlled intensity achieves what brute force cannot.
yin_fire_ENTJ.strength: Focused ambition, precise execution, quiet authority
yin_fire_ENTJ.weakness: Underestimated until it's too late, slow to trust others
yin_fire_ENTJ.career: Private equity partner, intelligence analyst, chief of staff, surgical department head, architect
yin_fire_ENTJ.growth_tip: Let people see your fire earlier. Trust doesn't always need to be earned — sometimes it's given.

yang_earth_ISTJ.title: The Bedrock — Unmovable, Unbreakable
yang_earth_ISTJ.desc: The Mountain's steadfast nature meets ISTJ's disciplined reliability. You are the foundation everything gets built on. Earthquakes, storms, trends — nothing moves you. Your consistency isn't boring; it's the thing that holds everything together.
yang_earth_ISTJ.strength: Absolute reliability, structural thinking, long-term endurance
yang_earth_ISTJ.weakness: Stubbornness mistaken for strength, blind spots about innovation
yang_earth_ISTJ.career: Civil engineer, bank manager, government regulator, logistics director, property manager
yang_earth_ISTJ.growth_tip: Even mountains erode without new soil. Let new ideas settle on you.

yang_earth_ISFJ.title: The Mountain Shelter — Always There When It Rains
yang_earth_ISFJ.desc: The Mountain's protective mass meets ISFJ's nurturing instinct. You're the person everyone runs to when life gets hard. Your strength isn't loud — it's the kind that shows up silently with soup when someone is sick, or stays on the phone until 3 AM when a friend is hurting.
yang_earth_ISFJ.strength: Unconditional support, quiet sacrifice, emotional stamina
yang_earth_ISFJ.career: Social worker, occupational therapist, school nurse, librarian, hospice caregiver
yang_earth_ISFJ.growth_tip: The mountain doesn't have to hold up the whole sky. Ask for help.

yang_earth_INFJ.title: The Wise Mountain with Ancient Eyes
yang_earth_INFJ.desc: The Mountain's permanence meets INFJ's visionary depth. You've been called 'an old soul' since childhood because you see the world with a wisdom that feels timeless. People come to you for perspective the way travelers come to mountains — to see further.
yang_earth_INFJ.strength: Ancient wisdom, stabilizing presence, far-sighted counsel
yang_earth_INFJ.weakness: Isolation from feeling too different, perfectionism about your vision
yang_earth_INFJ.career: Philosopher, spiritual counselor, heritage preservationist, long-range strategist, professor
yang_earth_INFJ.growth_tip: Wisdom shared is wisdom multiplied. Come down from the mountain sometimes.

yang_earth_INTJ.title: The Fortress Mind — Impenetrable and Calculating
yang_earth_INTJ.desc: The Mountain's immovable nature meets INTJ's fortress-like intellect. Your mind is a castle — well-defended, meticulously organized, and nearly impossible to breach. You plan in decades while others plan in weeks.
yang_earth_INTJ.strength: Impenetrable logic, decade-scale planning, structural genius
yang_earth_INTJ.weakness: Emotionally unreachable, dismisses what can't be measured
yang_earth_INTJ.career: Urban planner, defense strategist, infrastructure architect, research director, institutional investor
yang_earth_INTJ.growth_tip: The strongest fortress still needs a door. Let the right people in.

yang_earth_ISTP.title: The Mountain Craftsman — Built to Last
yang_earth_ISTP.desc: The Mountain's solidity meets ISTP's hands-on expertise. You build things that endure — whether it's a house, a system, or a reputation. You don't talk about quality; you simply deliver it. Every time.
yang_earth_ISTP.strength: Durable craftsmanship, calm problem-solving, physical competence
yang_earth_ISTP.weakness: Emotionally remote, impatient with abstract theory
yang_earth_ISTP.career: Structural engineer, master carpenter, equipment specialist, geologist, orthopedic surgeon
yang_earth_ISTP.growth_tip: The things you build speak for you — but sometimes, use your words too.

yang_earth_ISFP.title: The Mountain Garden — Strength and Beauty
yang_earth_ISFP.desc: The Mountain's grounded power meets ISFP's artistic soul. You prove that strength and sensitivity aren't opposites. You see beauty in stone and permanence in flowers. Your art has weight — it feels substantial, rooted, and deeply meaningful.
yang_earth_ISFP.strength: Grounded creativity, substantial art, calm strength
yang_earth_ISFP.weakness: Difficulty expressing inner world, seems unapproachable
yang_earth_ISFP.career: Landscape architect, sculptor, ceramicist, park ranger, sustainable designer
yang_earth_ISFP.growth_tip: The mountain garden needs visitors. Invite people into your creative world.

yang_earth_INFP.title: The Mountain Poet — Deep Roots, High Dreams
yang_earth_INFP.desc: The Mountain's grounded nature meets INFP's soaring idealism. You're that rare person who dreams impossibly big while keeping your feet firmly planted. Your inner world is vast, and when you express it, people feel the weight and authenticity of real earth beneath beautiful words.
yang_earth_INFP.strength: Grounded idealism, authentic expression, emotional depth with stability
yang_earth_INFP.weakness: Internal conflict between practical and ideal, slow to act on visions
yang_earth_INFP.career: Memoirist, environmental activist, therapist, philosophy teacher, cultural preservationist
yang_earth_INFP.growth_tip: Your dreams have foundations. That's rarer than you think. Start building.

yang_earth_INTP.title: The Mountain Observatory — Watching, Thinking, Mapping
yang_earth_INTP.desc: The Mountain's elevated vantage meets INTP's analytical mind. You see patterns from heights others can't reach. You're not in a hurry to come to conclusions — you'll observe for years if necessary, building models of how the world works with geological patience.
yang_earth_INTP.strength: Patient analysis, systemic thinking, unshakeable objectivity
yang_earth_INTP.weakness: Paralysis by analysis, too detached from human concerns
yang_earth_INTP.career: Systems theorist, climate scientist, database architect, actuary, cartographer
yang_earth_INTP.growth_tip: The map is not the territory. Step off the mountain and walk the ground.

yang_earth_ESTP.title: The Avalanche — When the Mountain Finally Moves
yang_earth_ESTP.desc: The Mountain's stored power meets ESTP's explosive action. Most of the time you're calm, grounded, unshakeable. But when you decide to move? You move everything. Your action is rare but devastating — like an avalanche that reshapes the landscape.
yang_earth_ESTP.strength: Stored power, decisive action, ground-level dominance
yang_earth_ESTP.weakness: Too much buildup, explosive when triggered
yang_earth_ESTP.career: Real estate mogul, restaurant empire builder, boxing promoter, demolition engineer, crisis commander
yang_earth_ESTP.growth_tip: You don't always have to wait until everything is at stake. Move earlier, move smaller.

yang_earth_ESFP.title: The Festival on the Mountaintop
yang_earth_ESFP.desc: The Mountain's grounded presence meets ESFP's celebratory spirit. You throw the party that nobody forgets — grounded, generous, and genuinely fun. You have this gift for creating memorable experiences that feel substantial, not empty.
yang_earth_ESFP.strength: Memorable presence, generous hospitality, grounded joy
yang_earth_ESFP.weakness: Overindulgence, avoids dealing with difficult emotions
yang_earth_ESFP.career: Resort manager, chef/restaurateur, festival organizer, sports coach, luxury brand manager
yang_earth_ESFP.growth_tip: The best parties have meaning behind them. What's yours?

yang_earth_ENFP.title: The Mountain That Dreams of Flying
yang_earth_ENFP.desc: The Mountain's weight meets ENFP's wings. This is a fascinating tension — you're wildly imaginative yet fundamentally grounded. You dream big but with gravity. Unlike most ENFPs, your ideas have weight and staying power because you can't help being realistic underneath it all.
yang_earth_ENFP.strength: Grounded imagination, ideas with substance, inspiring reliability
yang_earth_ENFP.weakness: Frustrated by your own gravity, torn between stability and adventure
yang_earth_ENFP.career: Social enterprise founder, architecture professor, brand strategist, travel entrepreneur, documentary producer
yang_earth_ENFP.growth_tip: You don't have to choose between roots and wings. You can have both.

yang_earth_ENTP.title: The Mountain That Questions Gravity
yang_earth_ENTP.desc: The Mountain's stability meets ENTP's iconoclastic mind. You challenge assumptions from the most stable position possible. Others dismiss your provocations as impossible — until you prove them wrong, from your unshakeable foundation.
yang_earth_ENTP.strength: Provocative from a position of strength, unshakeable in debate, practical innovation
yang_earth_ENTP.weakness: Contrarian for its own sake, frustrates more conventional minds
yang_earth_ENTP.career: Patent examiner turned inventor, regulatory disruptor, contrarian investor, debate champion, constitutional lawyer
yang_earth_ENTP.growth_tip: Your strength is questioning from solid ground. Don't let the questioning erode the ground.

yang_earth_ESTJ.title: The Mountain Fortress Commander
yang_earth_ESTJ.desc: The Mountain's mass meets ESTJ's commanding structure. You build organizations like fortresses — systematically, permanently, and with clear chains of command. Under your leadership, things don't just work; they work reliably for decades.
yang_earth_ESTJ.strength: Institutional builder, systematic authority, legacy-scale thinking
yang_earth_ESTJ.career: City mayor, military academy commander, hospital CEO, construction company president, university chancellor
yang_earth_ESTJ.growth_tip: The strongest institutions evolve. Build systems that can adapt, not just endure.

yang_earth_ESFJ.title: The Mountain That Everyone Calls Home
yang_earth_ESFJ.desc: The Mountain's protective strength meets ESFJ's community devotion. You're the foundation of your community — the person who remembers everyone's stories, organizes every gathering, and makes every newcomer feel welcome. People feel safe around you.
yang_earth_ESFJ.strength: Community foundation, protective warmth, inclusive leadership
yang_earth_ESFJ.weakness: Takes community rejection personally, overextends for others
yang_earth_ESFJ.career: Mayor of a small town, community center director, family physician, church leader, neighborhood organizer
yang_earth_ESFJ.growth_tip: You are the mountain — but even mountains need their own shelter.

yang_earth_ENFJ.title: The Mountain Guide Who Leads to the Summit
yang_earth_ENFJ.desc: The Mountain's endurance meets ENFJ's transformative leadership. You're the guide who takes people where they never thought they could go. Your combination of unshakeable presence and deep emotional intelligence makes people trust you with their biggest challenges.
yang_earth_ENFJ.strength: Transformative guide, emotional and physical endurance, trusted authority
yang_earth_ENFJ.weakness: Carries others' burdens as your own, difficulty delegating
yang_earth_ENFJ.career: Expedition leader, executive mentor, head of school, development director, organizational psychologist
yang_earth_ENFJ.growth_tip: You guide others to the summit — but who guides you? Find your own guide.

yang_earth_ENTJ.title: The Empire Builder — Mountain Scale Ambition
yang_earth_ENTJ.desc: The Mountain meets ENTJ's empire ambition. You don't build companies; you build institutions. You don't set goals; you set legacies. Your combination of absolute stability and relentless ambition creates things that outlast generations.
yang_earth_ENTJ.strength: Legacy building, institutional power, unshakeable ambition
yang_earth_ENTJ.weakness: Overwhelming to everyone else, lonely at scale
yang_earth_ENTJ.career: Founder of a dynasty, supreme court justice, military four-star, sovereign wealth fund director, university founder
yang_earth_ENTJ.growth_tip: Empires without warmth become prisons. Build with love, not just ambition.

yin_earth_ISTJ.title: The Garden Keeper — Nothing Goes Untended
yin_earth_ISTJ.desc: The Garden Soil's nurturing patience meets ISTJ's systematic care. You maintain everything — relationships, systems, gardens, records — with quiet, unfailing attention. Nothing dies on your watch because nothing goes unnoticed.
yin_earth_ISTJ.strength: Meticulous maintenance, quiet dedication, nothing falls through cracks
yin_earth_ISTJ.weakness: Inflexible routines, difficulty letting things go naturally
yin_earth_ISTJ.career: Records manager, quality inspector, pharmacist, museum conservator, estate manager
yin_earth_ISTJ.growth_tip: Some things need to be pruned, not preserved. Learn what to let go.

yin_earth_ISFJ.title: The Nurturing Earth — Everyone's Safe Place
yin_earth_ISFJ.desc: The Garden Soil's warmth meets ISFJ's bottomless compassion. You're the person who makes everyone feel like they belong. Your home is always open, your kitchen always has something cooking, and your heart always has room for one more.
yin_earth_ISFJ.strength: Unconditional nurturing, safe-space creation, emotional memory
yin_earth_ISFJ.weakness: Depleted from never saying no, invisible labor
yin_earth_ISFJ.career: Kindergarten teacher, home health aide, baker, bed & breakfast owner, doula
yin_earth_ISFJ.growth_tip: The garden can't grow if the gardener doesn't rest. Sleep in sometimes.

yin_earth_INFJ.title: The Sacred Garden — Where Souls Come to Heal
yin_earth_INFJ.desc: The Garden Soil's life-giving nature meets INFJ's spiritual depth. People seek you out not for advice, but for healing. Something about your presence allows others to let down their walls and grow. You understand human nature at a level that feels almost supernatural.
yin_earth_INFJ.strength: Healing presence, soul-level understanding, transformative nurturing
yin_earth_INFJ.weakness: Absorbs others' pain, struggles with emotional boundaries
yin_earth_INFJ.career: Therapist, spiritual healer, grief counselor, retreat center owner, depth psychologist
yin_earth_INFJ.growth_tip: You can't keep absorbing everyone's pain. Build a filter, not a wall.

yin_earth_INTJ.title: The Strategic Gardener — Every Seed Has a Plan
yin_earth_INTJ.desc: The Garden Soil's patient growth meets INTJ's strategic mind. You don't just plant — you design ecosystems. Every relationship, every investment, every project is carefully placed for maximum long-term yield. You think in seasons while others think in days.
yin_earth_INTJ.strength: Strategic patience, ecosystem thinking, calculated nurturing
yin_earth_INTJ.weakness: Views relationships as projects, emotionally distant
yin_earth_INTJ.career: Investment portfolio manager, agricultural scientist, organizational designer, curriculum developer, systems ecologist
yin_earth_INTJ.growth_tip: Not every relationship needs a strategy. Some just need presence.

yin_earth_ISTP.title: The Practical Farmer — Hands in the Soil
yin_earth_ISTP.desc: The Garden Soil's groundedness meets ISTP's practical mastery. You solve problems by getting your hands dirty — literally and figuratively. You don't theorize about growth; you dig, plant, water, and harvest. Results are your language.
yin_earth_ISTP.strength: Practical results, hands-on expertise, no-nonsense problem-solving
yin_earth_ISTP.weakness: Impatient with feelings, dismisses what can't be touched
yin_earth_ISTP.career: Agricultural engineer, physical therapist, culinary school instructor, landscape contractor, veterinary surgeon
yin_earth_ISTP.growth_tip: Some of the most important things in life can't be held in your hands.

yin_earth_ISFP.title: The Cottage Garden — Wild Beauty with Quiet Order
yin_earth_ISFP.desc: The Garden Soil's nurturing nature meets ISFP's artistic freedom. Your creativity looks effortless, like a cottage garden that seems wild but is actually carefully tended. You create beauty that feels organic, lived-in, and deeply personal.
yin_earth_ISFP.strength: Organic creativity, authentic aesthetics, gentle cultivation
yin_earth_ISFP.weakness: Resists structure, may not receive recognition for invisible artistry
yin_earth_ISFP.career: Garden designer, artisan baker, herbalist, folk artist, sustainable fashion designer
yin_earth_ISFP.growth_tip: Your wild beauty deserves an audience. Let people walk through your garden.

yin_earth_INFP.title: The Secret Garden — Rich Inner World, Hidden from View
yin_earth_INFP.desc: The Garden Soil's depth meets INFP's vast inner landscape. Your soul is a secret garden — lush, alive, and almost impossibly beautiful, but hidden behind walls that few are invited to enter. When you do let someone in, they find a world they never want to leave.
yin_earth_INFP.strength: Rich inner life, profound emotional depth, selective but deep connections
yin_earth_INFP.weakness: Too hidden, loneliness from self-imposed isolation
yin_earth_INFP.career: Journal publisher, retreat facilitator, poetry therapist, children's book author, botanical illustrator
yin_earth_INFP.growth_tip: The world on the other side of your wall is waiting. Open the gate a little wider.

yin_earth_INTP.title: The Research Garden — Growing Knowledge in Quiet Rows
yin_earth_INTP.desc: The Garden Soil's patient growth meets INTP's systematic curiosity. You cultivate knowledge the way a gardener cultivates plants — methodically, patiently, and with deep understanding of what conditions each idea needs to thrive.
yin_earth_INTP.strength: Methodical knowledge-building, patient expertise, conceptual cultivation
yin_earth_INTP.weakness: Over-theorizes instead of harvesting results, isolated
yin_earth_INTP.career: Research botanist, academic researcher, taxonomy specialist, data cultivation engineer, clinical trial designer
yin_earth_INTP.growth_tip: At some point, the harvest has to come in. Share what you've grown.

yin_earth_ESTP.title: The Market Farmer — Grow It, Sell It, Move On
yin_earth_ESTP.desc: The Garden Soil's productivity meets ESTP's hustler energy. You grow things fast, bring them to market faster, and move on to the next opportunity. You're practical, productive, and you know exactly what sells.
yin_earth_ESTP.strength: Fast-cycle productivity, market instincts, practical salesmanship
yin_earth_ESTP.weakness: Sacrifices quality for speed, shallow roots
yin_earth_ESTP.career: Food truck owner, real estate flipper, wholesale distributor, pop-up entrepreneur, produce broker
yin_earth_ESTP.growth_tip: Slow growth produces the sweetest fruit. Plant something you plan to keep.

yin_earth_ESFP.title: The Garden Party Host — Where Life Grows and Celebrates
yin_earth_ESFP.desc: The Garden Soil's generosity meets ESFP's party spirit. You host life's celebrations surrounded by things you've nurtured — food you've cooked, flowers you've grown, people you've welcomed. Your events feel organic and nourishing, never hollow.
yin_earth_ESFP.strength: Generous hosting, nourishing presence, organic celebrations
yin_earth_ESFP.weakness: Avoids serious topics, overextends in hosting others
yin_earth_ESFP.career: Caterer, farm-to-table restaurateur, wedding venue owner, cooking show host, children's party organizer
yin_earth_ESFP.growth_tip: The best hosts also sit down and eat. Join your own party.

yin_earth_ENFP.title: The Community Garden — Everyone Grows Together
yin_earth_ENFP.desc: The Garden Soil's nurturing instinct meets ENFP's gift for connecting people. You build communities where everyone has a plot and everyone grows. Your enthusiasm for people's potential is matched by your genuine ability to help them flourish.
yin_earth_ENFP.strength: Community cultivation, people development, infectious optimism about growth
yin_earth_ENFP.weakness: Over-committed to too many people, neglects own soil
yin_earth_ENFP.career: Community organizer, startup incubator director, school garden coordinator, talent developer, social enterprise founder
yin_earth_ENFP.growth_tip: You can't water everyone's garden. Make sure yours is thriving first.

yin_earth_ENTP.title: The Experimental Garden — Always Testing What Grows
yin_earth_ENTP.desc: The Garden Soil's growing potential meets ENTP's experimental mind. You're always testing new approaches, new combinations, new methods. Your garden looks chaotic to outsiders, but every odd planting is an experiment with a hypothesis behind it.
yin_earth_ENTP.strength: Innovative cultivation, experimental approach, creative problem-solving
yin_earth_ENTP.weakness: Too many experiments, not enough harvests
yin_earth_ENTP.career: Agricultural innovator, permaculture designer, edtech founder, alternative medicine researcher, startup pivot specialist
yin_earth_ENTP.growth_tip: Every experiment needs a conclusion. Write up your results and share them.

yin_earth_ESTJ.title: The Master Groundskeeper — Order in Every Row
yin_earth_ESTJ.desc: The Garden Soil's productivity meets ESTJ's love of order. Your garden is immaculate — every row straight, every plant labeled, every schedule followed. You prove that discipline and nurturing aren't opposites; they're partners.
yin_earth_ESTJ.strength: Disciplined cultivation, productive order, reliable results
yin_earth_ESTJ.weakness: Rigid methods, upset when things grow outside the plan
yin_earth_ESTJ.career: Agricultural operations manager, school administrator, hospital department head, military supply officer, estate superintendent
yin_earth_ESTJ.growth_tip: Some of the best things in your garden will grow where you didn't plant them. Let them.

yin_earth_ESFJ.title: The Family Garden — Feeding Everyone with Love
yin_earth_ESFJ.desc: The Garden Soil's nurturing meets ESFJ's family devotion. You are everyone's mom/dad energy — the person who feeds, remembers, celebrates, and holds everything together. Your love is practical: home-cooked meals, hand-written notes, and showing up every single time.
yin_earth_ESFJ.strength: Nurturing leadership, practical love, family cohesion
yin_earth_ESFJ.weakness: Identity crisis when the nest empties, can't stop giving
yin_earth_ESFJ.career: Family restaurant owner, elementary school teacher, pediatric nurse, community center manager, family therapist
yin_earth_ESFJ.growth_tip: When the kids leave the garden, you'll discover it was always also yours.

yin_earth_ENFJ.title: The Growth Coach — Cultivating Human Potential
yin_earth_ENFJ.desc: The Garden Soil's life-giving nature meets ENFJ's passion for developing people. You see seeds where others see nothing, and you coax impossible growth from unlikely soil. Your mentorship isn't generic — it's customized to exactly what each person needs.
yin_earth_ENFJ.strength: Personalized development, intuitive nurturing, transformative mentorship
yin_earth_ENFJ.weakness: Emotional burnout from over-investment in others' growth
yin_earth_ENFJ.career: Executive coach, talent development VP, teaching hospital director, youth program founder, organizational development consultant
yin_earth_ENFJ.growth_tip: The best coaches have coaches. Invest in your own growth as much as others'.

yin_earth_ENTJ.title: The Agricultural Empire — Growing at Scale
yin_earth_ENTJ.desc: The Garden Soil's productivity meets ENTJ's scale ambition. You don't just garden — you build agricultural systems. Your nurturing instinct operates at industrial scale, creating organizations that grow people, products, and profits simultaneously.
yin_earth_ENTJ.strength: Scale cultivation, systematic growth, productive leadership
yin_earth_ENTJ.weakness: People become metrics, nurturing becomes management
yin_earth_ENTJ.career: Agribusiness CEO, talent pipeline architect, franchise empire builder, educational institution founder, venture growth partner
yin_earth_ENTJ.growth_tip: At your scale, one warm conversation can be worth more than a hundred KPIs.

yang_metal_ISTJ.title: The Blade That Never Dulls
yang_metal_ISTJ.desc: The Sword's cutting decisiveness meets ISTJ's unwavering discipline. You execute with precision that others find almost frightening. Rules aren't guidelines to you — they're the code you live by. In your hands, justice and efficiency become the same thing.
yang_metal_ISTJ.strength: Precision execution, absolute consistency, moral clarity
yang_metal_ISTJ.career: Judge, military prosecutor, quality control director, compliance chief, forensic accountant
yang_metal_ISTJ.growth_tip: Justice without mercy cuts the innocent too. Learn when to sheathe the blade.

yang_metal_ISFJ.title: The Shield — Strength in Service
yang_metal_ISFJ.desc: The Sword's protective strength meets ISFJ's devotion to others. You don't wield your strength for glory — you use it to protect. You're the person who stands between danger and the people you love, quietly and without hesitation.
yang_metal_ISFJ.strength: Protective strength, selfless courage, quiet heroism
yang_metal_ISFJ.career: Firefighter, protective services, ER nurse, security specialist, child advocacy lawyer
yang_metal_ISFJ.growth_tip: The shield-bearer deserves rest too. Let someone else stand guard tonight.

yang_metal_INFJ.title: The Righteous Blade — Cutting Through Injustice
yang_metal_INFJ.desc: The Sword's decisive power meets INFJ's moral clarity. When you see injustice, you don't just feel it — you act on it. Your blade is guided by vision and conscience, making you a formidable advocate for those who can't fight for themselves.
yang_metal_INFJ.strength: Moral conviction, decisive action for justice, visionary advocacy
yang_metal_INFJ.weakness: Exhaustion from carrying the weight of the world's wrongs
yang_metal_INFJ.career: Human rights lawyer, investigative journalist, ethics officer, social justice advocate, ombudsman
yang_metal_INFJ.growth_tip: You can't right every wrong. Choose your battles wisely, and rest between them.

yang_metal_INTJ.title: The Master Strategist with a Sword
yang_metal_INTJ.desc: The Sword's decisive action meets INTJ's chess-master mind. You strike precisely where it matters, exactly when it matters, and only as hard as necessary. No wasted movement, no wasted thought. Your opponents are usually defeated before they realize the game has started.
yang_metal_INTJ.strength: Strategic precision, decisive timing, calculated force
yang_metal_INTJ.career: Military strategist, hedge fund manager, corporate restructuring specialist, cybersecurity director, M&A attorney
yang_metal_INTJ.growth_tip: Not every interaction is a game. Sometimes people just want to talk.

yang_metal_ISTP.title: The Bladesmith — Master of Craft and Edge
yang_metal_ISTP.desc: The Sword's raw power meets ISTP's hands-on mastery. You don't just use tools — you become one with them. Your skill is in your hands, your judgment is instant, and your work has the precision of something forged under intense heat and pressure.
yang_metal_ISTP.strength: Master craftsmanship, tool mastery, instant judgment
yang_metal_ISTP.career: Master machinist, weapons engineer, orthopedic surgeon, race mechanic, precision welder
yang_metal_ISTP.growth_tip: Even the greatest bladesmith needs an apprentice. Pass on what you know.

yang_metal_ISFP.title: The Sword Dancer — Power as Art
yang_metal_ISFP.desc: The Sword's raw energy meets ISFP's artistic soul. You transform strength into beauty. Martial arts, dance, metalwork — you find the art in power and the power in art. Your creations are striking, bold, and unmistakably yours.
yang_metal_ISFP.strength: Artistic strength, bold aesthetics, embodied creativity
yang_metal_ISFP.weakness: Torn between power and sensitivity, inner conflict
yang_metal_ISFP.career: Martial artist, metal sculptor, jewelry designer, tattoo artist, stunt choreographer
yang_metal_ISFP.growth_tip: Your unique blend of strength and beauty is your signature. Own it fully.

yang_metal_INFP.title: The Pen as Sword — Words That Cut Through Lies
yang_metal_INFP.desc: The Sword's cutting power channels through INFP's pen. You fight with words, art, and ideas — cutting through deception and hypocrisy with the precision of a master swordsman. Your idealism isn't passive; it's a weapon for truth.
yang_metal_INFP.strength: Powerful writing, moral courage, truth-telling through art
yang_metal_INFP.weakness: Emotionally wounded by conflict, avoids direct confrontation
yang_metal_INFP.career: Investigative author, protest artist, human rights blogger, documentary editor, opinion columnist
yang_metal_INFP.growth_tip: Your words are your sword. Keep them sharp — but know when to put them down.

yang_metal_INTP.title: The Analytical Blade — Cutting Problems to Their Core
yang_metal_INTP.desc: The Sword's decisiveness meets INTP's analytical depth. You cut through complexity like a hot knife through butter. Where others see tangled problems, you see clean lines of cause and effect. Your analysis is surgical, your conclusions are sharp, and your logic is unbreakable.
yang_metal_INTP.strength: Surgical analysis, clean logic, cutting through complexity
yang_metal_INTP.weakness: Too sharp for social situations, intimidating intellect
yang_metal_INTP.career: Systems analyst, theoretical researcher, algorithmic trader, formal logician, diagnostic physician
