yang_metal_INTP.growth_tip: Being right isn't always being helpful. Sometimes people need warmth, not answers.

yang_metal_ESTP.title: The Gladiator — Born for the Arena
yang_metal_ESTP.desc: The Sword's raw power meets ESTP's competitive fire. You live for the fight — the deal, the game, the negotiation, the competition. You thrive under pressure, think on your feet, and your instinct for victory is almost animalistic.
yang_metal_ESTP.strength: Competitive dominance, pressure performance, killer instinct
yang_metal_ESTP.weakness: Addicted to conflict, difficulty with peace
yang_metal_ESTP.career: Trial lawyer, professional athlete, hostage negotiator, competitive sales leader, stunt performer
yang_metal_ESTP.growth_tip: Not everything is a battle. Learning to enjoy peace is its own kind of strength.

yang_metal_ESFP.title: The Showstopper — Steel with Sparkle
yang_metal_ESFP.desc: The Sword's commanding presence meets ESFP's performance flair. You walk into a room and everyone notices. You have the edge of steel but the shine of a spotlight. Your performances — whether on stage or in meetings — have a sharpness that cuts through mediocrity.
yang_metal_ESFP.strength: Commanding performance, sharp charisma, unforgettable presence
yang_metal_ESFP.weakness: Ego needs constant feeding, crashes hard without applause
yang_metal_ESFP.career: Rock musician, pro wrestler, luxury sales director, keynote performer, fashion show producer
yang_metal_ESFP.growth_tip: Your edge doesn't dull when the spotlight turns off. Learn who you are in the quiet.

yang_metal_ENFP.title: The Crusader — Passionate and Armed
yang_metal_ENFP.desc: The Sword's power meets ENFP's passionate cause. You're not just an idealist — you're an armed one. When you find a cause worth fighting for, you charge in with charisma, conviction, and a blade that won't stop swinging until justice is done.
yang_metal_ENFP.strength: Passionate advocacy, charismatic fighting spirit, inspiring courage
yang_metal_ENFP.weakness: Fights too many battles at once, burnout from crusading
yang_metal_ENFP.career: Activist leader, campaign director, civil rights attorney, war correspondent, social impact entrepreneur
yang_metal_ENFP.growth_tip: The crusader who never rests becomes a casualty. Choose one battle and win it completely.

yang_metal_ENTP.title: The Devil's Advocate with a Real Sword
yang_metal_ENTP.desc: The Sword's cutting power meets ENTP's love of intellectual combat. You don't just argue — you dissect. Your debates aren't performances; they're autopsies of bad ideas. You can dismantle any argument with terrifying efficiency and enjoy every second of it.
yang_metal_ENTP.strength: Devastating logic, intellectual fearlessness, argument mastery
yang_metal_ENTP.weakness: Exhausts everyone around you, wins battles but loses friends
yang_metal_ENTP.career: Constitutional lawyer, debate champion, tech disruptor, policy analyst, competitive strategist
yang_metal_ENTP.growth_tip: Winning every argument is a lonely victory. Sometimes let the other person be right.

yang_metal_ESTJ.title: The Commander — Order Through Strength
yang_metal_ESTJ.desc: The Sword's authority meets ESTJ's command structure. You run things with military precision. Your word is law, your systems are airtight, and anyone who challenges the process gets a very clear correction. Under your command, chaos becomes order.
yang_metal_ESTJ.strength: Absolute authority, systematic control, decisive leadership
yang_metal_ESTJ.career: Police chief, military commander, prison warden, surgical department head, factory superintendent
yang_metal_ESTJ.growth_tip: The strongest commanders inspire loyalty, not fear. Lead with respect, not just authority.

yang_metal_ESFJ.title: The Protector of the Community
yang_metal_ESFJ.desc: The Sword's protective instinct meets ESFJ's community devotion. You defend your people fiercely — your family, your team, your neighborhood. Your strength is in service of belonging, and you'll fight anyone who threatens the harmony you've built.
yang_metal_ESFJ.strength: Fierce protection, community loyalty, strong moral backbone
yang_metal_ESFJ.weakness: Overprotective, sees threats where there are none
yang_metal_ESFJ.career: Union leader, school resource officer, community defense attorney, family patriarch/matriarch, neighborhood watch organizer
yang_metal_ESFJ.growth_tip: Not every stranger is a threat. Sometimes the community grows by welcoming new members.

yang_metal_ENFJ.title: The Warrior-Teacher — Leading by Example
yang_metal_ENFJ.desc: The Sword's disciplined power meets ENFJ's transformative leadership. You don't just teach values — you embody them. You lead from the front, fight for your people, and inspire others through action, not just words. Your leadership has weight because everyone sees you doing the hard thing first.
yang_metal_ENFJ.strength: Leading by example, principled action, inspirational discipline
yang_metal_ENFJ.weakness: Pushes others as hard as you push yourself, hard to live up to
yang_metal_ENFJ.career: Military academy instructor, leadership consultant, head of school, civil rights leader, athletic director
yang_metal_ENFJ.growth_tip: Not everyone can match your pace. Walk beside people sometimes, not always ahead.

yang_metal_ENTJ.title: The Warlord CEO — Absolute Power, Clear Vision
yang_metal_ENTJ.desc: The Sword meets ENTJ's total dominance. You lead with unquestioned authority and crystal-clear direction. You cut through politics, inefficiency, and doubt with a single decisive stroke. People follow you because the alternative is getting left behind.
yang_metal_ENTJ.strength: Supreme authority, visionary decisiveness, total organizational control
yang_metal_ENTJ.weakness: Feared more than loved, creates dependency
yang_metal_ENTJ.career: Defense industry CEO, political power broker, turnaround specialist, commanding general, global operations director
yang_metal_ENTJ.growth_tip: The leader people choose to follow beats the leader people are forced to follow. Every time.

yin_metal_ISTJ.title: The Master Jeweler — Flawless Precision
yin_metal_ISTJ.desc: The Jewel's exacting standards meet ISTJ's systematic perfection. Every detail matters to you — every comma, every decimal, every thread. Your work isn't just good; it's immaculate. You hold yourself and your work to standards that most people consider impossibly high.
yin_metal_ISTJ.strength: Flawless execution, obsessive quality, systematic perfection
yin_metal_ISTJ.weakness: Paralyzed by imperfection, critical of others' standards
yin_metal_ISTJ.career: Diamond grader, museum restorer, precision machinist, pharmaceutical quality director, patent examiner
yin_metal_ISTJ.growth_tip: Perfection is the enemy of done. Sometimes 'very good' is perfect enough.

yin_metal_ISFJ.title: The Family Heirloom — Precious and Carefully Kept
yin_metal_ISFJ.desc: The Jewel's refined nature meets ISFJ's tender preservation. You cherish what matters — relationships, memories, traditions — and tend to them with the care of someone polishing a family heirloom. Your love is expressed through meticulous, consistent attention.
yin_metal_ISFJ.strength: Careful preservation, refined care, meaningful attention
yin_metal_ISFJ.weakness: Difficulty letting go of what's no longer valuable, resistance to change
yin_metal_ISFJ.career: Antique restorer, heritage curator, family law mediator, genealogist, geriatric care specialist
yin_metal_ISFJ.growth_tip: Some things deserve to be passed on. Some deserve to be released. Learn the difference.

yin_metal_INFJ.title: The Crystal Ball — Seeing What Others Can't
yin_metal_INFJ.desc: The Jewel's clarity meets INFJ's visionary intuition. Your perception is crystalline — you see through people, situations, and possibilities with gem-like clarity. Your insights cut through confusion like light through a prism, revealing hidden spectrums of meaning.
yin_metal_INFJ.strength: Crystal-clear insight, refined intuition, penetrating vision
yin_metal_INFJ.weakness: Lonely clarity — seeing what others can't is isolating
yin_metal_INFJ.career: Intuitive counselor, luxury brand curator, symbolic analyst, art appraiser, depth psychologist
yin_metal_INFJ.growth_tip: Not everyone can see what you see. Meet them where they are, not where you are.

yin_metal_INTJ.title: The Diamond Mind — Hardest and Clearest
yin_metal_INTJ.desc: The Jewel's perfection meets INTJ's strategic brilliance. Your mind is a diamond — the hardest natural substance, and the clearest. You compress enormous pressure into flawless thought. Your strategies aren't just smart; they're beautiful in their precision.
yin_metal_INTJ.strength: Crystalline strategy, pressure-forged brilliance, intellectual perfection
yin_metal_INTJ.weakness: Too hard to connect with, impossibly high standards for everyone
yin_metal_INTJ.career: Senior strategist, luxury brand CEO, master watchmaker, chief architect, theoretical physicist
yin_metal_INTJ.growth_tip: Diamonds are formed under pressure — but they also need light to shine. Let people see you.

yin_metal_ISTP.title: The Precision Instrument — Not a Wasted Movement
yin_metal_ISTP.desc: The Jewel's exactness meets ISTP's mechanical mastery. Your hands work with the precision of a Swiss movement. No wasted motion, no unnecessary steps. You create, fix, and build with an efficiency that borders on art.
yin_metal_ISTP.strength: Mechanical precision, efficient craftsmanship, instinctive expertise
yin_metal_ISTP.weakness: Cold efficiency may alienate others, difficulty verbalizing skill
yin_metal_ISTP.career: Watch repair specialist, precision engineer, microsurgeon, luthier, aerospace technician
yin_metal_ISTP.growth_tip: Your hands know things your mouth doesn't. But sometimes, explaining helps others learn.

yin_metal_ISFP.title: The Jewelry Artist — Beauty Forged in Fire
yin_metal_ISFP.desc: The Jewel's refined beauty meets ISFP's artistic passion. You create beauty that requires both artistic sensitivity and technical precision. Every piece you make — whether jewelry, music, or food — carries your distinct mark of refined, personal artistry.
yin_metal_ISFP.strength: Refined artistry, technical beauty, distinctive aesthetic voice
yin_metal_ISFP.weakness: Undervalues own work, reluctant to sell or promote
yin_metal_ISFP.career: Jewelry designer, pastry chef, couture tailor, perfumer, calligraphy artist
yin_metal_ISFP.growth_tip: Your art is worth exactly what people are willing to pay for it. Let them.

yin_metal_INFP.title: The Poet with a Silver Pen — Beautiful and Sharp
yin_metal_INFP.desc: The Jewel's refined edge meets INFP's poetic soul. Your words are silver — beautiful to read but sharp enough to cut. You write with a precision and beauty that reveals truth others can't articulate. Your sensitivity is your greatest tool and your greatest vulnerability.
yin_metal_INFP.strength: Refined expression, beautiful precision, truth through beauty
yin_metal_INFP.weakness: Perfectionism blocks creation, over-polishes until meaning is lost
yin_metal_INFP.career: Literary editor, fine art photographer, luxury copywriter, poet laureate, perfume critic
yin_metal_INFP.growth_tip: Your first draft is already beautiful. Stop polishing and start publishing.

yin_metal_INTP.title: The Lens Maker — Clarity as a Craft
yin_metal_INTP.desc: The Jewel's clarity meets INTP's analytical precision. You grind intellectual lenses that let others see things they couldn't see before. Your theories are precise, elegant, and crystal-clear. You don't just solve problems; you reframe them so the solution becomes obvious.
yin_metal_INTP.strength: Intellectual precision, elegant problem reframing, analytical beauty
yin_metal_INTP.weakness: Detached from practical application, perfectionism in theory
yin_metal_INTP.career: Optical physicist, logic professor, UX analyst, epistemologist, precision algorithm designer
yin_metal_INTP.growth_tip: The best lens is useless if no one looks through it. Build for users, not just truth.

yin_metal_ESTP.title: The Flashy Blade — Quick, Sharp, Spectacular
yin_metal_ESTP.desc: The Jewel's sharp edge meets ESTP's quick reflexes. You're the flashy operator who makes the difficult look effortless. Your timing is impeccable, your moves are polished, and you always know exactly when to strike for maximum impact.
yin_metal_ESTP.strength: Polished performance, impeccable timing, effortless cool
yin_metal_ESTP.weakness: Style over substance, easily bored once mastery is achieved
yin_metal_ESTP.career: Luxury car salesman, poker champion, sports talent agent, nightclub owner, gem dealer
yin_metal_ESTP.growth_tip: Cool is a tool, not an identity. Show people what's underneath the polish.

yin_metal_ESFP.title: The Diva — Polished Brilliance on Stage
yin_metal_ESFP.desc: The Jewel's brilliance meets ESFP's love of the spotlight. You don't just perform — you dazzle. Your presentation is flawless, your timing is perfect, and you understand that beauty and precision create moments people never forget.
yin_metal_ESFP.strength: Dazzling performance, polished presentation, memorable impact
yin_metal_ESFP.weakness: Needs constant validation, crushed by negative reviews
yin_metal_ESFP.career: Fashion model, luxury brand ambassador, TV host, celebrity stylist, pageant director
yin_metal_ESFP.growth_tip: The greatest artists are great with or without an audience. Find your off-stage self.

yin_metal_ENFP.title: The Diamond in the Rough — Sparkling and Unpredictable
yin_metal_ENFP.desc: The Jewel's brilliance meets ENFP's unpredictable energy. You're a gem that refuses to be set — sparkling in every direction, captivating and impossible to categorize. Your combination of refinement and wild energy makes you utterly unique.
yin_metal_ENFP.strength: Unique brilliance, captivating unpredictability, refined creativity
yin_metal_ENFP.weakness: Too many facets to focus, dazzles but doesn't always deliver
yin_metal_ENFP.career: Creative director, artist agent, brand innovator, festival curator, experiential designer
yin_metal_ENFP.growth_tip: A diamond's value comes from its cut — find your shape and commit to it.

yin_metal_ENTP.title: The Scalpel Mind — Sharp, Precise, and Provocative
yin_metal_ENTP.desc: The Jewel's precision meets ENTP's provocative intellect. Your arguments are surgically precise. You don't bludgeon opponents — you dissect their logic with clean, elegant cuts. Your intellectual style is more rapier than broadsword.
yin_metal_ENTP.strength: Elegant argumentation, precise provocation, intellectual style
yin_metal_ENTP.weakness: Too clever for the room, comes across as pretentious
yin_metal_ENTP.career: Patent attorney, appellate judge, tech architecture critic, philosophy professor, precision debater
yin_metal_ENTP.growth_tip: Precision impresses. Connection inspires. Aim for both.

yin_metal_ESTJ.title: The Quality Inspector — Nothing Gets Past You
yin_metal_ESTJ.desc: The Jewel's exacting eye meets ESTJ's systematic control. You set the standard and enforce it without exception. Under your watch, quality doesn't slip, details don't get missed, and standards don't get compromised. Period.
yin_metal_ESTJ.strength: Uncompromising standards, systematic quality control, absolute reliability
yin_metal_ESTJ.career: Chief quality officer, ISO auditor, regulatory compliance director, production superintendent, inspection chief
yin_metal_ESTJ.growth_tip: Teach your standards instead of enforcing them. Delegation is the ultimate quality system.

yin_metal_ESFJ.title: The Gracious Host — Elegance in Every Detail
yin_metal_ESFJ.desc: The Jewel's refined taste meets ESFJ's social grace. You create experiences that are polished, thoughtful, and beautiful. Every table setting, every conversation, every gesture reflects your commitment to making others feel special.
yin_metal_ESFJ.strength: Social elegance, refined hospitality, attention to detail in service
yin_metal_ESFJ.weakness: Exhausted by maintaining perfection, upset by social missteps
yin_metal_ESFJ.career: Luxury hotel manager, etiquette consultant, private event designer, diplomatic protocol officer, wedding coordinator
yin_metal_ESFJ.growth_tip: Imperfection can be charming. Let the dinner party be a little messy sometimes.

yin_metal_ENFJ.title: The Finishing School — Polishing Others to Brilliance
yin_metal_ENFJ.desc: The Jewel's refining nature meets ENFJ's development instinct. You don't just help people grow — you polish them to their highest shine. You see the gem in every rough stone and know exactly how to cut, shape, and reveal the brilliance within.
yin_metal_ENFJ.strength: Talent refinement, development precision, polishing potential
yin_metal_ENFJ.weakness: Projection of your standards onto others, difficulty accepting raw authenticity
yin_metal_ENFJ.career: Executive presence coach, finishing school director, talent management VP, performing arts instructor, brand identity consultant
yin_metal_ENFJ.growth_tip: Not everyone wants to be polished. Some people shine exactly as they are.

yin_metal_ENTJ.title: The Luxury Brand — Premium by Design
yin_metal_ENTJ.desc: The Jewel's premium nature meets ENTJ's brand-building ambition. You don't just compete — you position yourself above the competition entirely. Your standards are luxury-grade, your execution is flawless, and your brand is unmistakable.
yin_metal_ENTJ.strength: Premium positioning, flawless brand, luxury-grade standards
yin_metal_ENTJ.weakness: Elitist tendencies, inaccessible to the masses
yin_metal_ENTJ.career: Luxury brand CEO, Michelin-star restaurateur, chief design officer, private wealth manager, haute couture house director
yin_metal_ENTJ.growth_tip: True luxury isn't exclusion — it's making people feel they belong to something exceptional.

yang_water_ISTJ.title: The Deep Current — Unseen but Unstoppable
yang_water_ISTJ.desc: The Ocean's vastness meets ISTJ's hidden reliability. You're the deep ocean current — invisible from the surface but moving mountains of water underneath. Your influence is quiet, constant, and far more powerful than anyone realizes.
yang_water_ISTJ.strength: Hidden influence, vast reliability, deep-current impact
yang_water_ISTJ.weakness: Invisible contributions go unrecognized, unexpressed depth
yang_water_ISTJ.career: Intelligence analyst, infrastructure planner, supply chain director, submarine officer, hydrologist
yang_water_ISTJ.growth_tip: Your depth deserves to surface sometimes. Let people see what moves beneath.

yang_water_ISFJ.title: The Warm Harbor — Safe Passage for All
yang_water_ISFJ.desc: The Ocean's embrace meets ISFJ's protective nurturing. You're the harbor that welcomes every ship home. Storms rage outside, but in your care, people find calm waters, a warm dock, and a light always on. Your safety is legendary among those who know you.
yang_water_ISFJ.strength: Safe haven creation, oceanic patience, bottomless compassion
yang_water_ISFJ.weakness: Becomes everyone's port, own needs drown in the tides
yang_water_ISFJ.career: Refugee resettlement coordinator, hospice director, school counselor, maritime rescue, family shelter manager
yang_water_ISFJ.growth_tip: The harbor needs maintenance too. Close the gates and rest sometimes.

yang_water_INFJ.title: The Mystic Ocean — Depths Beyond Measure
yang_water_INFJ.desc: The Ocean's fathomless depth meets INFJ's mystical intuition. Your inner world is an ocean — vast, dark, beautiful, and full of things that haven't been named yet. People sense your depth before you speak. Your presence alone changes the energy of a room.
yang_water_INFJ.strength: Oceanic intuition, presence that shifts atmospheres, unfathomable depth
yang_water_INFJ.weakness: Drowns in own depths, struggles to surface for ordinary life
yang_water_INFJ.career: Depth psychologist, oceanic researcher, spiritual retreat leader, symbolist author, dream analyst
yang_water_INFJ.growth_tip: The ocean floor is magnificent — but life happens at the surface. Come up for air.

yang_water_INTJ.title: The Strategic Tide — Patient and Inevitable
yang_water_INTJ.desc: The Ocean's unstoppable force meets INTJ's long-game strategy. You don't rush — you're the tide. Slow, patient, inevitable. You erode obstacles not with force but with time. Your strategic patience outlasts everyone else's urgency.
yang_water_INTJ.strength: Tidal patience, inevitable strategy, erosion-style problem solving
yang_water_INTJ.weakness: So patient that opportunities drift by, intimidatingly calm
yang_water_INTJ.career: Long-term portfolio strategist, climate policy architect, geopolitical analyst, pharmaceutical research director, deep tech investor
yang_water_INTJ.growth_tip: Patience is your superpower — but sometimes the tide needs to rush.

yang_water_ISTP.title: The Deep-Sea Diver — Calm in the Abyss
yang_water_ISTP.desc: The Ocean's depth meets ISTP's unflappable composure. You operate in environments that would terrify others — high pressure, zero visibility, total isolation — and you do it with steady hands and a calm heart. You're built for the deep.
yang_water_ISTP.strength: Pressure performance, extreme calm, deep-environment mastery
yang_water_ISTP.weakness: Disconnected at the surface, difficulty with everyday social life
yang_water_ISTP.career: Deep-sea welder, submarine engineer, anesthesiologist, cave rescue specialist, bomb disposal technician
yang_water_ISTP.growth_tip: You thrive in the deep — but the people who love you live on the surface.

yang_water_ISFP.title: The Ocean Artist — Beauty in Every Wave
yang_water_ISFP.desc: The Ocean's endless movement meets ISFP's artistic sensitivity. You find beauty in the ever-changing patterns of water, light, and emotion. Your art flows like the ocean — sometimes calm, sometimes stormy, always genuine and deeply moving.
yang_water_ISFP.strength: Flowing creativity, emotional authenticity, natural beauty
yang_water_ISFP.career: Marine painter, surf photographer, oceanside musician, aquatic dancer, environmental artist
yang_water_ISFP.growth_tip: The ocean has currents. Find yours and let it carry you somewhere intentional.

yang_water_INFP.title: The Ocean Dreamer — Lost in Beautiful Depths
yang_water_INFP.desc: The Ocean's vastness meets INFP's infinite inner world. Your imagination is oceanic — boundless, deep, and full of undiscovered life. You create entire worlds inside yourself and struggle to find words big enough to describe what you see down there.
yang_water_INFP.strength: Limitless imagination, emotional oceans, profound creative vision
yang_water_INFP.weakness: So deep inside that the real world feels shallow and disappointing
yang_water_INFP.career: Fantasy novelist, music composer, therapeutic storyteller, immersive experience designer, oceanic conservationist
yang_water_INFP.growth_tip: Your ocean is magnificent — but you need a shore. Build one real thing today.

yang_water_INTP.title: The Ocean Mind — Endless Exploration
yang_water_INTP.desc: The Ocean's boundlessness meets INTP's insatiable curiosity. Your mind explores ideas the way the ocean explores coastlines — endlessly, relentlessly, finding new inlets and hidden coves that no one else has mapped. Your intellectual territory is vast and mostly uncharted.
yang_water_INTP.strength: Boundless intellectual exploration, mapping unknown territory, conceptual depth
yang_water_INTP.weakness: Lost at sea — too many directions, no final destination
yang_water_INTP.career: Oceanographer, theoretical computer scientist, cryptographer, philosophy of mind researcher, complex systems modeler
yang_water_INTP.growth_tip: Even the ocean has shores. Choose a direction and follow it to land.

yang_water_ESTP.title: The Rogue Wave — Sudden and Devastating
yang_water_ESTP.desc: The Ocean's raw power meets ESTP's explosive instinct. You're calm until you're not — and when you move, you move with the force of a rogue wave. Competitors don't see you coming until you've already hit. Your timing is devastating and your impact is unforgettable.
yang_water_ESTP.strength: Explosive timing, devastating impact, fearless momentum
yang_water_ESTP.career: Emergency responder, hedge fund crisis trader, extreme sports athlete, nightlife mogul, pirate (entrepreneurial kind)
yang_water_ESTP.growth_tip: Controlled power is more devastating than wild power. Learn to choose when to hit.

yang_water_ESFP.title: The Beach Party — Ocean Meets Sunshine
yang_water_ESFP.desc: The Ocean's depth meets ESFP's surface sparkle. You're the beach party — the best of both worlds. Deep waters underneath, sparkling sunshine on top. You make the ocean feel fun, accessible, and inviting. People have the time of their lives around you.
yang_water_ESFP.strength: Making depth accessible, infectious fun, inviting presence
yang_water_ESFP.weakness: Depth gets hidden by entertainment, underestimated
yang_water_ESFP.career: Beach resort director, water sports instructor, cruise entertainment director, ocean-themed restaurant owner, surf brand founder
yang_water_ESFP.growth_tip: You have more depth than people see. Invite them deeper.

yang_water_ENFP.title: The Whirlpool — Drawing Everyone In
yang_water_ENFP.desc: The Ocean's pull meets ENFP's magnetic personality. You're a whirlpool of ideas, energy, and connection — people get drawn into your orbit and can't help but be swept up. Your enthusiasm for life is as vast as the sea, and equally impossible to resist.
yang_water_ENFP.strength: Magnetic pull, vast enthusiasm, irresistible energy
yang_water_ENFP.weakness: Pulls people in faster than you can keep them, chaotic center
yang_water_ENFP.career: Festival founder, startup ecosystem builder, talent scout, adventure tour company CEO, social media phenomenon
yang_water_ENFP.growth_tip: The whirlpool is exciting — but make sure there's solid ground at the center.

yang_water_ENTP.title: The Storm Chaser — Intellect Meets the Tempest
yang_water_ENTP.desc: The Ocean's turbulence meets ENTP's thrill-seeking mind. You don't avoid intellectual storms — you run toward them. The bigger the controversy, the more complex the problem, the more interesting it gets for you. You find clarity in chaos that no one else can navigate.
yang_water_ENTP.strength: Thriving in intellectual chaos, storm-level problem solving, turbulent creativity
yang_water_ENTP.weakness: Creates storms for entertainment, destructive when bored
yang_water_ENTP.career: Crisis consultant, geopolitical analyst, startup troubleshooter, investigative reporter, competitive debate champion
yang_water_ENTP.growth_tip: Not every calm sea needs a storm. Sometimes the best move is to enjoy the quiet.

yang_water_ESTJ.title: The Naval Commander — Order on the Open Sea
yang_water_ESTJ.desc: The Ocean's vastness meets ESTJ's commanding discipline. You bring structure to formless chaos. Like a naval commander, you navigate enormous uncertainty with clear procedures, decisive authority, and the confidence that comes from knowing your ship is always battle-ready.
yang_water_ESTJ.strength: Structure in chaos, commanding navigation, decisive maritime leadership
yang_water_ESTJ.weakness: Over-controls what can't be controlled, fights the ocean instead of flowing with it
yang_water_ESTJ.career: Naval officer, port authority director, maritime logistics CEO, coast guard commander, offshore operations manager
yang_water_ESTJ.growth_tip: You can't command the ocean. But you can learn to read it. Adapt more, control less.

yang_water_ESFJ.title: The Lighthouse Community — Guiding Ships Home
yang_water_ESFJ.desc: The Ocean's vast reach meets ESFJ's caring community spirit. You build communities that span oceans — connecting people across distances with warmth, consistency, and genuine care. You're the lighthouse that keeps the whole fleet connected and safe.
yang_water_ESFJ.strength: Long-distance community building, consistent warmth across scale, connecting presence
yang_water_ESFJ.weakness: Exhausted by maintaining connections across such vast distances
yang_water_ESFJ.career: Expatriate community director, international school coordinator, maritime family support, global HR manager, diaspora community organizer
yang_water_ESFJ.growth_tip: You can't be everyone's lighthouse. Choose which harbors matter most to you.

yang_water_ENFJ.title: The Ocean Current That Carries People to Shore
yang_water_ENFJ.desc: The Ocean's power meets ENFJ's rescue instinct. You carry people — literally and emotionally — to where they need to be. Your influence moves entire groups in the right direction, often without them even realizing you're the current beneath them.
yang_water_ENFJ.strength: Invisible influence, rescue instinct, directional leadership
yang_water_ENFJ.weakness: Carries others at the cost of your own direction, savior fatigue
yang_water_ENFJ.career: Refugee assistance director, transformational coach, naval rescue commander, international NGO leader, crisis counselor
yang_water_ENFJ.growth_tip: The current can't carry everyone. Save your strength for those who are truly drowning.

yang_water_ENTJ.title: The Ocean Emperor — Ruling the Endless Blue
yang_water_ENTJ.desc: The Ocean meets ENTJ's total dominion. You don't just navigate the ocean — you rule it. Trade routes, shipping lanes, resource extraction — you see the sea not as chaos but as an empire waiting for someone bold enough to claim it. That someone is you.
yang_water_ENTJ.strength: Oceanic ambition, global-scale command, resource mastery
yang_water_ENTJ.weakness: Hubris — believing you can control the uncontrollable
yang_water_ENTJ.career: Shipping empire founder, global logistics CEO, oil & gas executive, international trade mogul, maritime defense contractor
yang_water_ENTJ.growth_tip: The ocean was here before you and will be here after. Respect what you can't control.

yin_water_ISTJ.title: The Morning Routine — Quiet Consistency That Sustains
yin_water_ISTJ.desc: The Morning Dew's gentle persistence meets ISTJ's daily discipline. Like dew that appears faithfully every dawn, you show up — consistently, quietly, reliably. Your small, steady contributions compound into something extraordinary over time. You're the person who waters the plant every day while everyone else forgets.
yin_water_ISTJ.strength: Consistent small actions, compound reliability, quiet sustaining power
yin_water_ISTJ.weakness: So quiet your contributions go completely unnoticed, frustration from anonymity
yin_water_ISTJ.career: Data entry specialist, journal keeper, pharmacy technician, irrigation engineer, maintenance planner
yin_water_ISTJ.growth_tip: Your consistency is your superpower. But occasionally, let someone see you shine.

yin_water_ISFJ.title: The Healing Rain — Soft and Restorative
yin_water_ISFJ.desc: The Morning Dew's nourishing touch meets ISFJ's healing compassion. You restore people the way rain restores dry earth — gently, persistently, and without asking for credit. Your presence alone makes people feel like everything will be okay.
yin_water_ISFJ.strength: Healing presence, gentle restoration, compassion without ego
yin_water_ISFJ.career: Hospice nurse, rain garden designer, aromatherapist, library aide, naturopathic practitioner
yin_water_ISFJ.growth_tip: The rain doesn't know it makes flowers grow. But you should. Know your worth.

yin_water_INFJ.title: The Oracle Pool — Still Water That Reflects Everything
yin_water_INFJ.desc: The Morning Dew's clarity meets INFJ's prophetic vision. You're a still pool that reflects truths others don't want to see. People come to you for readings — not of cards, but of themselves. Your clarity is simultaneously comforting and unsettling.
yin_water_INFJ.strength: Reflective clarity, prophetic accuracy, soul-mirror intuition
yin_water_INFJ.weakness: Overwhelmed by reflecting everyone's truth, spiritual exhaustion
yin_water_INFJ.career: Oracle/intuitive counselor, dream analyst, reflective writing teacher, Jungian therapist, sacred space designer
yin_water_INFJ.growth_tip: You reflect everyone else's truth. When was the last time you looked in the mirror yourself?

yin_water_INTJ.title: The Code Breaker — Pattern Recognition in the Mist
yin_water_INTJ.desc: The Morning Dew's subtle perception meets INTJ's code-cracking mind. You notice patterns in the fog that others can't even see. Your intelligence works like dew — gathering silently, appearing suddenly, and revealing the invisible structure beneath the surface.
yin_water_INTJ.strength: Subtle pattern detection, invisible intelligence gathering, quiet devastation
yin_water_INTJ.weakness: So subtle you're underestimated, frustration when others miss what's obvious to you
yin_water_INTJ.career: Intelligence codebreaker, epidemiologist, forensic data analyst, quantum computing researcher, early-stage venture scout
yin_water_INTJ.growth_tip: Others can't see the patterns until you show them. Be patient — then be clear.

yin_water_ISTP.title: The Morning Mist Mechanic — Appearing, Fixing, Vanishing
yin_water_ISTP.desc: The Morning Dew's quiet appearance meets ISTP's fix-it-and-leave efficiency. You appear when something's broken, fix it silently, and vanish before anyone can say thank you. You're the person who solves problems at 5 AM while the world sleeps.
yin_water_ISTP.strength: Ghost-like efficiency, pre-dawn problem solving, no ego in the fix
yin_water_ISTP.weakness: So invisible that credit always goes elsewhere, loneliness from anonymity
yin_water_ISTP.career: Early-morning IT support, overnight maintenance engineer, anonymous pen-tester, pre-dawn baker, laboratory preparation technician
yin_water_ISTP.growth_tip: You don't need the spotlight — but you do need acknowledgment. Ask for it.

yin_water_ISFP.title: The Dewdrop Artist — Beauty in the Smallest Things
yin_water_ISFP.desc: The Morning Dew's delicate beauty meets ISFP's artistic sensitivity. You find beauty in things so small that most people walk right past them. A single dewdrop on a petal, the way light moves through water — your eye for beauty operates at microscopic scale.
yin_water_ISFP.strength: Microscopic beauty awareness, delicate artistry, profound sensitivity
yin_water_ISFP.weakness: Too fragile for the rough world, art too subtle for mass appreciation
yin_water_ISFP.career: Macro photographer, miniature artist, watercolor painter, terrarium designer, sensory experience creator
yin_water_ISFP.growth_tip: Small beauty has power. Trust that people will lean in close enough to see it.

yin_water_INFP.title: The Tear Poet — Turning Pain into Petals
yin_water_INFP.desc: The Morning Dew's emotional sensitivity meets INFP's poetic soul. You feel everything deeply and transform those feelings into art that makes others cry. Your tears become other people's rain — nourishing emotions they didn't know they needed to feel.
yin_water_INFP.strength: Emotional alchemy, transformative art, universal emotional language
yin_water_INFP.weakness: Drowns in own feelings, difficulty functioning when emotionally overwhelmed
yin_water_INFP.career: Poet, grief counselor, lyricist, emotional wellness writer, art therapy practitioner
yin_water_INFP.growth_tip: Your tears water the world — but make sure you save some sunshine for yourself.

yin_water_INTP.title: The Lab Droplet — Precise Observation Under the Microscope
yin_water_INTP.desc: The Morning Dew's subtle nature meets INTP's precise observation. You examine the world one droplet at a time, with the patience and precision of a researcher studying condensation patterns. Your insights are small but perfectly formed.
yin_water_INTP.strength: Micro-precision, patient observation, perfectly formed insights
yin_water_INTP.weakness: Scope too narrow, misses the forest for the dewdrop
yin_water_INTP.career: Microbiologist, precision researcher, analytical chemist, behavioral micro-analyst, condensed matter physicist
yin_water_INTP.growth_tip: Zoom out occasionally. The dewdrop is part of a rainstorm, and the rainstorm is part of a cycle.

yin_water_ESTP.title: The Quick Rain — Fast, Refreshing, Gone
yin_water_ESTP.desc: The Morning Dew's quick appearance meets ESTP's lightning action. You appear suddenly, make an impact, refresh everything, and move on. You're the quick rain that everyone was waiting for — brief but transformative.
yin_water_ESTP.strength: Quick impact, refreshing presence, efficient transformation
yin_water_ESTP.weakness: Gone before anyone can build on what you started, commitment-phobic
yin_water_ESTP.career: Flash sale entrepreneur, pop-up restaurant owner, crisis PR specialist, emergency medic, speed consultant
yin_water_ESTP.growth_tip: Rain that stays a little longer creates rivers. Try lingering.

yin_water_ESFP.title: The Sparkling Dew — Tiny but Dazzling
yin_water_ESFP.desc: The Morning Dew's delicate sparkle meets ESFP's love of performance. You're the dewdrop that catches the first ray of sunshine and turns it into a rainbow. Small, beautiful, and absolutely dazzling for anyone paying attention.
yin_water_ESFP.strength: Dazzling charm, ability to turn small moments into magic, sparkling presence
yin_water_ESFP.weakness: Evaporates quickly, impact may be short-lived
yin_water_ESFP.career: Party sparkler, boutique owner, glitter makeup artist, morning show host, champagne brand ambassador
yin_water_ESFP.growth_tip: Sparkle is temporary — but if you can make it consistent, you become a diamond.

yin_water_ENFP.title: The Cloud Seeder — Making It Rain Wherever You Go
yin_water_ENFP.desc: The Morning Dew's nourishing nature meets ENFP's spreading energy. You seed clouds wherever you go — planting ideas, starting conversations, nurturing connections — and eventually, it rains inspiration. You catalyze growth in every community you touch.
yin_water_ENFP.strength: Catalytic presence, idea seeding, community nourishment
yin_water_ENFP.weakness: Seeds too many clouds, not all of them rain
yin_water_ENFP.career: Community catalyst, innovation facilitator, creative workshop leader, network builder, inspiration consultant
yin_water_ENFP.growth_tip: Choose fewer clouds and make sure they actually rain. Quality over quantity.

yin_water_ENTP.title: The Acid Rain — Dissolves What Doesn't Belong
yin_water_ENTP.desc: The Morning Dew's subtle chemistry meets ENTP's corrosive questioning. Your intellect dissolves false assumptions the way acid rain dissolves limestone. It's not always comfortable, but what's left after you're done is the bedrock truth.
yin_water_ENTP.strength: Dissolving false narratives, intellectual chemistry, revealing bedrock truth
yin_water_ENTP.weakness: Corrosive to relationships, too caustic for sensitive environments
yin_water_ENTP.career: Fact-checker, fraud investigator, pharmaceutical patent challenger, satirical journalist, forensic accountant
yin_water_ENTP.growth_tip: Dissolving lies is necessary work. But rebuild something in the space you clear.

yin_water_ESTJ.title: The Irrigation System — Organized Distribution of Life
yin_water_ESTJ.desc: The Morning Dew's life-giving nature meets ESTJ's systematic organization. You channel resources where they're needed with engineering precision. Nothing is wasted, nothing is missed, and everything grows on schedule.
yin_water_ESTJ.strength: Resource optimization, systematic nurturing, zero-waste distribution
yin_water_ESTJ.weakness: Treats living things like plumbing, mechanical approach to human needs
yin_water_ESTJ.career: Agricultural operations director, water utility manager, resource distribution coordinator, supply chain optimizer, public works engineer
yin_water_ESTJ.growth_tip: Water finds its own way sometimes. Not everything needs a pipe.

yin_water_ESFJ.title: The Gentle Rain on a Family Gathering
yin_water_ESFJ.desc: The Morning Dew's tender nourishment meets ESFJ's family devotion. You nourish your community the way gentle rain nourishes a garden — consistently, softly, and with love. Your gatherings feel like coming home after a long dry spell.
yin_water_ESFJ.strength: Nourishing gatherings, consistent community care, gentle family leadership
yin_water_ESFJ.weakness: Devastated when family members drift away, gives until dry
yin_water_ESFJ.career: Family reunion organizer, community garden coordinator, school parent committee leader, neighborhood bakery owner, senior day center manager
yin_water_ESFJ.growth_tip: Even rain clouds need to refill from the ocean. Take time to nourish yourself.

yin_water_ENFJ.title: The Life-Giving Rain — Every Drop Has Purpose
yin_water_ENFJ.desc: The Morning Dew's gentle power meets ENFJ's purposeful leadership. Every drop of your effort is intentional — you don't waste energy, and you don't waste care. You know exactly who needs what, when, and how much. Your nurturing is precise, purposeful, and transformative.
yin_water_ENFJ.strength: Purposeful nurturing, precise emotional investment, transformative care
yin_water_ENFJ.weakness: Controlled to the point of being calculated, difficulty being spontaneous
yin_water_ENFJ.career: Development program director, transformational therapist, holistic health director, mentoring program founder, community development strategist
yin_water_ENFJ.growth_tip: Let some of your kindness be spontaneous. Not every drop needs a target.

yin_water_ENTJ.title: The Rain Maker — Controlling the Weather Itself
yin_water_ENTJ.desc: The Morning Dew's subtle power meets ENTJ's god-level ambition. You don't wait for rain — you make it happen. Cloud seeding, atmospheric control, weather modification — as a metaphor for your approach to life: you don't accept conditions, you create them.
yin_water_ENTJ.strength: Condition creation, atmospheric control, manufacturing opportunity
yin_water_ENTJ.weakness: Playing god with natural systems, unintended consequences
yin_water_ENTJ.career: Climate tech CEO, water futures trader, geopolitical resource strategist, atmospheric scientist-turned-entrepreneur, cloud computing pioneer
yin_water_ENTJ.growth_tip: Even rain makers need to respect the weather. Control is an illusion — influence is real.

wood_excess.title: Too Much Wood — Overgrowth Mode
wood_excess.desc: Excess Wood energy makes you restless, overambitious, and easily frustrated. You're growing in every direction at once but finishing nothing. You may feel anger bubbling up more than usual.
wood_excess.advice: Channel Metal energy: cut back commitments, set firm boundaries, and practice saying no. Trim what doesn't serve you.
wood_excess.lucky_color: White or silver (Metal energy to prune overgrowth)
wood_excess.lucky_food: Spicy foods, ginger, radish — Metal element foods that cut through excess growth
wood_excess.warning: Watch for liver issues, eye strain, and muscle tension from stored frustration.

wood_deficient.title: Not Enough Wood — Stuck in Place
wood_deficient.desc: Deficient Wood energy leaves you feeling stagnant, unmotivated, and unable to start new things. You may feel stuck, directionless, or emotionally flat.
wood_deficient.advice: Feed your Wood with Water: rest deeply, read broadly, hydrate generously. Growth starts from stillness.
wood_deficient.lucky_color: Green or teal (Wood energy to reignite growth)
wood_deficient.lucky_food: Leafy greens, sprouts, sour fruits — Wood element foods that stimulate new growth
wood_deficient.warning: Watch for joint stiffness, poor flexibility, and feelings of depression.

fire_excess.title: Too Much Fire — Burning Out
fire_excess.desc: Excess Fire energy makes you anxious, scattered, and emotionally volatile. You're running too hot — sleeping poorly, talking too fast, and burning bridges.
fire_excess.advice: Cool down with Water energy: slow down, meditate, spend time near water. Not everything needs your immediate attention.
fire_excess.lucky_color: Black or navy blue (Water energy to cool the flames)
fire_excess.lucky_food: Watermelon, cucumber, bitter greens — Water element foods that cool internal heat
fire_excess.warning: Watch for heart palpitations, insomnia, and anxiety attacks.

fire_deficient.title: Not Enough Fire — Light Gone Out
fire_deficient.desc: Deficient Fire energy leaves you cold, disconnected, and unable to feel joy or passion. Everything feels gray and flat.
fire_deficient.advice: Kindle your Fire with Wood: exercise, socialize, start something creative. Movement creates warmth.
fire_deficient.lucky_color: Red or orange (Fire energy to reignite passion)
fire_deficient.lucky_food: Dark chocolate, cinnamon, red peppers — Fire element foods that warm from within
fire_deficient.warning: Watch for poor circulation, cold hands/feet, and emotional numbness.

earth_excess.title: Too Much Earth — Stuck in the Mud
earth_excess.desc: Excess Earth energy makes you overthinking, worry-prone, and resistant to all change. You're so grounded you can't move. Comfort zones become prisons.
earth_excess.advice: Break it up with Wood energy: try something new, travel somewhere unfamiliar, shake up your routine.
earth_excess.lucky_color: Green or turquoise (Wood energy to break through stagnation)
earth_excess.lucky_food: Sour foods, vinegar-based dishes, green tea — Wood element foods that cut through heaviness
earth_excess.warning: Watch for digestive problems, bloating, and chronic worry loops.

earth_deficient.title: Not Enough Earth — No Ground to Stand On
earth_deficient.desc: Deficient Earth energy leaves you feeling ungrounded, scattered, and unable to focus. Nothing feels stable, and your thoughts spin without landing.
earth_deficient.advice: Nourish your Earth with Fire: warm relationships, cozy environments, and grounding rituals bring you back.
earth_deficient.lucky_color: Yellow or golden brown (Earth energy for grounding)
earth_deficient.lucky_food: Root vegetables, sweet potatoes, whole grains — Earth element foods that ground and center
earth_deficient.warning: Watch for blood sugar instability, scattered thinking, and difficulty concentrating.

metal_excess.title: Too Much Metal — Too Sharp, Too Rigid
metal_excess.desc: Excess Metal energy makes you harsh, judgmental, and emotionally cutting. You're so precise that you've lost all softness. Perfectionism is strangling your joy.
metal_excess.advice: Melt it with Fire energy: laugh more, be playful, embrace imperfection deliberately.
metal_excess.lucky_color: Red or warm pink (Fire energy to melt rigidity)
metal_excess.lucky_food: Bitter herbs, dark leafy greens, turmeric — Fire element foods that melt hardness
metal_excess.warning: Watch for respiratory issues, dry skin, and chronic tension in shoulders.

metal_deficient.title: Not Enough Metal — No Boundaries
metal_deficient.desc: Deficient Metal energy leaves you unable to set boundaries, make decisions, or let things go. You say yes to everything and regret it immediately.
metal_deficient.advice: Strengthen your Metal with Earth: create routines, organize your space, build structure into your day.
metal_deficient.lucky_color: White or silver (Metal energy to sharpen your edge)
metal_deficient.lucky_food: Rice, tofu, white radish — Metal element foods that strengthen clarity and structure
metal_deficient.warning: Watch for chronic indecisiveness, respiratory weakness, and cluttered living spaces.

water_excess.title: Too Much Water — Drowning in Emotion
water_excess.desc: Excess Water energy makes you fearful, withdrawn, and emotionally overwhelmed. You're drowning in your own depths, overthinking everything, and isolating yourself.
water_excess.advice: Dam it with Earth energy: ground yourself, create structure, connect with the physical world. Get out of your head.
water_excess.lucky_color: Yellow or brown (Earth energy to contain overflow)
water_excess.lucky_food: Root vegetables, pumpkin, millet — Earth element foods that absorb excess fluid and ground you
water_excess.warning: Watch for kidney issues, lower back pain, and irrational fears.

water_deficient.title: Not Enough Water — Running Dry
water_deficient.desc: Deficient Water energy leaves you depleted, burned out, and unable to access your intuition. Your well is empty, your creativity is dry, and you feel old beyond your years.
water_deficient.advice: Replenish your Water with Metal: rest deeply, declutter your life, and create space for emptiness. Wisdom returns in silence.
water_deficient.lucky_color: Black or deep blue (Water energy to refill the well)
water_deficient.lucky_food: Seaweed, black beans, bone broth — Water element foods that deeply replenish reserves
water_deficient.warning: Watch for chronic exhaustion, hearing issues, and premature aging signs.

yang_wood.work_style: Natural leader who charges ahead. Needs autonomy and big goals to stay engaged.
yang_wood.avoid: Micromanaged environments, repetitive tasks, positions without authority

yin_wood.work_style: Flexible collaborator who adapts to any team. Shines when given creative freedom.
yin_wood.avoid: Rigid corporate hierarchies, confrontational roles, solo monotonous work

yang_fire.work_style: High-energy performer who thrives in fast-paced environments. Needs audience and impact.
yang_fire.avoid: Desk-only jobs, slow-moving bureaucracies, work without visible results

yin_fire.work_style: Focused specialist who excels in deep, concentrated work. Detail-oriented and precise.
yin_fire.avoid: Superficial roles, constant socializing requirements, work without depth

yang_earth.work_style: Institutional builder who creates lasting structures. Patient and long-term oriented.
yang_earth.avoid: Startups that pivot weekly, gig economy, roles requiring constant reinvention

yin_earth.work_style: People developer who thrives in nurturing roles. Practical and emotionally attuned.
yin_earth.avoid: Cutthroat competition, roles requiring emotional detachment, isolation

yang_metal.work_style: Decisive executor who excels under pressure. Values justice and clear right/wrong.
yang_metal.avoid: Ambiguous moral situations, roles requiring diplomatic compromise, low-stakes environments

yin_metal.work_style: Aesthetic perfectionist with refined taste. Excels where quality and precision matter most.
yin_metal.avoid: Mass production, discount environments, work without aesthetic standards

yang_water.work_style: Strategic thinker with vast perspective. Thrives navigating complexity and uncertainty.
yang_water.avoid: Narrow, unchanging roles, micromanagement, predictable daily routines

yin_water.work_style: Emotionally intuitive connector who senses what others need. Best in one-on-one settings.
yin_water.avoid: High-pressure sales, confrontational negotiations, emotionally cold environments

wood.2026_spring: Spring is YOUR season. Growth energy peaks — new projects, new relationships, and fresh starts are heavily favored. Plant seeds now that you'll harvest all year.
wood.2026_summer: Your spring momentum meets summer heat. Pace yourself — overgrowth without pruning leads to chaos. Focus and trim.
wood.2026_fall: Metal energy autumn naturally prunes Wood. Don't resist it — let go of what's not working. The shedding is necessary.
wood.2026_winter: Winter rest is essential for spring growth. Retreat, reflect, and recharge. This is your incubation period, not a failure.

fire.2026_spring: Spring feeds your flame — Wood generates Fire. Creative ideas spark easily. Capture them before they vanish.
fire.2026_summer: This is your peak season. Maximum energy, maximum visibility, maximum impact. But beware of burning out at the top.
fire.2026_fall: Autumn's Metal energy cuts Fire. You may feel restricted or criticized. Use it to refine, not to fight.
fire.2026_winter: Water season directly opposes Fire. Rest is not optional — it's survival. Pull back and protect your flame.

earth.2026_spring: Spring's Wood energy can destabilize Earth. Stay grounded when everything around you is changing. You're the anchor.
earth.2026_summer: Fire feeds Earth — summer brings support and recognition for your steady efforts. Enjoy it.
earth.2026_fall: Earth generates Metal in autumn — your hard work produces tangible results. Harvest season.
earth.2026_winter: Winter's Water energy can erode your foundations. Reinforce your base: finances, health, key relationships.

metal.2026_spring: Spring's growth energy may feel chaotic to you. Don't fight the change — sharpen your edge to match it.
metal.2026_summer: Fire melts Metal — summer challenges your rigidity. Be flexible or break. Choose growth over perfection.
metal.2026_fall: Autumn is YOUR season. Clarity peaks, decisions feel sharp, and your precision is finally appreciated by everyone.
metal.2026_winter: Water carries Metal energy forward. Your autumn clarity flows into winter wisdom. Excellent time for deep planning.

water.2026_spring: Your winter wisdom feeds spring growth. Ideas you incubated during quiet months now sprout into action.
water.2026_summer: Fire evaporates Water — summer demands you come out of your shell. Uncomfortable but necessary growth.
water.2026_fall: Metal generates Water — autumn feeds your wisdom. Insights come easily. Trust your intuition now.
water.2026_winter: Winter is YOUR season. Maximum intuitive power, deepest reflection, and the strongest connection to your inner compass.

tough_love.title: You're So Busy Leading That You Forgot to Check If Anyone's Still Following
tough_love.desc: Yang Wood types charge ahead like a mighty oak growing toward the sky — straight, relentless, impressive. But here's the thing: trees don't look behind them. You've probably already left people behind without realizing it. Your MBTI type doesn't matter — if you're Yang Wood, you need to ask yourself: am I leading, or am I just walking alone really confidently?

encouragement.title: The World Needs Trees That Refuse to Bend — That's You
encouragement.desc: You're the oak in the storm. Everyone else is swaying, panicking, running — and you're just standing there. Not because you're stubborn (okay, a little) but because your roots go DEEP. People depend on your strength more than they'll ever tell you. Keep standing.

love.title: You Love Like a Tree — Strong, Sheltering, But Sometimes Suffocating
love.desc: Yang Wood in love is protective, reliable, and steady. But your 'strong' can become 'controlling' if you're not careful. You want to shelter your partner, but they need sunlight too. In Eastern metaphysics, you're best matched with someone who brings Fire energy — warming your bark without burning you down.
love.ideal_partner: Someone who matches your strength but brings warmth — a Fire type who challenges you to soften
love.love_warning: Sheltering isn't the same as controlling. Give them room to grow their own roots.

wealth.title: You Build Wealth Like You Build Everything — Slowly, Massively, Permanently
wealth.desc: Yang Wood wealth style is long-term infrastructure. You don't flip — you build. Real estate, businesses with deep foundations, investments that mature over decades. Quick money bores you. Your patience IS your wealth strategy.
wealth.money_style: Long-term builder, invests in permanent assets, dislikes speculation
wealth.wealth_tip: Your patience is your edge. Don't let impatient people rush your timeline.

career.title: Born to Lead, But Choose Your Forest Wisely
career.desc: Yang Wood people naturally rise to leadership — you can't help it. But not every organization deserves your roots. Choose a mission worth your decades of dedication, because once you commit, you'll grow there forever.
career.work_style: Natural commander who leads by example, builds permanent things

health.title: Even Oak Trees Get Diseases — Take Care of Your Liver
health.desc: In Eastern medicine, Wood energy governs the liver and eyes. Yang Wood types who suppress anger or overwork develop liver heat, eye strain, and tension headaches. You think you're indestructible — you're not. Those headaches aren't normal.
health.health_tip: Stretch daily — your body is as rigid as your willpower. Yoga or tai chi would literally change your life.

relationships.title: Everyone Leans on You — But Who Do You Lean On?
relationships.desc: You're the strong friend, the reliable one, the person who always has it together. But trees that never bend eventually snap. Find one person — just one — who you trust enough to be weak around. That's not vulnerability; that's survival.

travel.title: Ancient Forests and Mountains Where Giants Grow
travel.desc: Yang Wood thrives in places with towering trees, vast mountains, and expansive natural energy. You recharge where nature is BIG — redwood forests, mountain ranges, places where the landscape dwarfs human ego.

domestic.reason: Walking among trees older and larger than you reminds you that patience always wins
Ancient Appalachian forests with deep root systems mirror your own persistent energy
Temperate rainforests with towering trees and mist awaken your Wood energy to full power

international.reason: Dense, ancient forest energy that resonates deeply with Yang Wood's grounded strength
1,000-year-old cedar trees on a mystical island — this is where Yang Wood comes home
The largest forest on Earth matches the scale of Yang Wood's ambition and life force

travel.avoid: Dry deserts and treeless plains drain Yang Wood energy fast. You need the presence of living, growing things.
travel.travel_tip: Hug a tree. Literally. Yang Wood people recharge through physical contact with old-growth forests.

yang_wood.final_message: The tree that grows the slowest lives the longest. Your patience is not a weakness — it's your immortality.

life_turning_point.title: When the Sapling Becomes the Canopy
life_turning_point.desc: Yang Wood takes time to mature, but when you hit your stride, you tower over everything. Your turning points are dramatic — slow builds followed by explosive growth.

periods.desc: You finally find the ground worth planting in — career, relationship, or mission locks into place.
Your core becomes unmovable. Career authority, financial stability, and personal identity crystallize.
You become the shade that others seek. Peak influence and leadership recognition.
Wisdom, legacy, and the deep satisfaction of seeing what you planted decades ago bearing fruit.

life_turning_point.key_year: 2027-2028 brings strong Wood energy support — excellent years for Yang Wood to make bold moves.

fengshui.title: A Space Where Giants Grow
fengshui.desc: Yang Wood needs space — high ceilings, natural light, and real plants. Cramped, artificial environments slowly kill your energy.

room_tips.tip: Large indoor tree (fiddle leaf fig, bird of paradise) — one statement plant that commands the room like you do.
Wooden desk, natural light from the east, and a view of something green. This is non-negotiable for Yang Wood productivity.
Earth tones with green accents. Real wood furniture. No plastic, no synthetic materials touching your skin while you sleep.

fengshui.color_scheme: Forest green + warm brown + touches of gold
fengshui.avoid: All-white minimalist spaces and metal-heavy industrial interiors drain Yang Wood energy.
fengshui.item: A bonsai tree — the art of directing growth with patience, which is Yang Wood's entire life philosophy.

accessory.title: Power Pieces for the Towering Oak
accessory.desc: Yang Wood benefits from Water (which feeds Wood) and Fire (which Wood generates) energy accessories.

recommendations.reason: The king of Eastern gemstones — jade channels growth, prosperity, and the deep persistence of Wood.
A timepiece made from your own element keeps you grounded and connected to your natural rhythm.
Known as the 'stone of opportunity' — it amplifies Yang Wood's natural luck in leadership and new ventures.

accessory.avoid_material: Heavy metal jewelry (especially steel or iron) creates a Metal-cutting-Wood clash that saps your energy.
accessory.tip: Wear green on important days — it's not superstition, it's resonance with your core element.

scent.title: The Scent of Ancient Forests
scent.desc: Yang Wood resonates with deep, woody, green scents that evoke old-growth forests and morning rain on bark.

recommendations.reason: The sacred wood of Japanese temples — this scent grounds Yang Wood while elevating your presence.
Deep root energy in a bottle. Vetiver connects Yang Wood to the soil that feeds it.
Evergreen and moss — the scent of forests that never die. Perfect for Yang Wood's persistent nature.

scent.mood: Hinoki for formal occasions, pine for everyday grounding, vetiver for deep focus work.
scent.tip: Apply woody scents to your pulse points on the wrists — Wood energy flows through the liver meridian, which passes through the wrists.

tough_love.title: You're So Flexible That Nobody Knows What You Actually Stand For
tough_love.desc: Yin Wood bends to every wind. That's your gift — adaptability, diplomacy, survival. But when's the last time you planted your flag somewhere? Being flexible is amazing until people realize they can push you in any direction. Even vines need a trellis.

encouragement.title: The Vine That Outlasts the Oak — Quiet Strength Is Still Strength
encouragement.desc: People underestimate you constantly. Let them. While the oaks are snapping in the storm, you're bending, surviving, and quietly wrapping yourself around the ruins. Your kind of strength doesn't make the news, but it's the kind that's still standing when the cameras leave.

love.title: You Love by Wrapping Yourself Around Someone — Beautiful Until It's Suffocating
love.desc: Yin Wood in love is tender, attentive, and deeply intertwined with their partner. But there's a thin line between intimacy and entanglement. You need a partner who has their own strong structure for you to grow alongside — not someone you have to become the structure for.
love.ideal_partner: Someone with strong, stable energy who gives you something to grow alongside — not someone you need to hold up
love.love_warning: Growing together is love. Growing around someone is codependency. Know the difference.

wealth.title: Your Network Is Your Net Worth — Literally
wealth.desc: Yin Wood doesn't build wealth through brute force — you grow it through connections. Every relationship is a tendril reaching toward a new opportunity. Your financial success is directly proportional to the quality of your network.
wealth.money_style: Network-based wealth builder, thrives in partnership models, grows wealth through relationships
wealth.wealth_tip: Invest in relationships before you invest in stocks. Your ROI on coffee meetings is insane.

career.title: You Don't Climb the Ladder — You Grow Around It
career.desc: Yin Wood doesn't fit neatly into traditional career paths. You find your own way in, wrap yourself around opportunities others miss, and end up in positions nobody expected. Your career path looks confusing from outside but makes perfect sense to you.
career.work_style: Adaptive collaborator who thrives in creative, flexible environments

health.title: Your Flexibility Has a Price — Watch Your Tendons
health.desc: Yin Wood governs tendons, ligaments, and the nervous system. Your adaptability means your body takes on stress quietly, storing tension in your connective tissue until something snaps — sometimes literally.
health.health_tip: Gentle stretching daily is essential — your body mirrors your personality. Keep it supple.

relationships.title: You're Everyone's Emotional Support Plant — But Who Waters You?
relationships.desc: You adapt to every friend's needs, absorb their emotions, and bend to make them comfortable. But plants need watering too. Find friends who check on YOU — not just the ones who expect you to adapt to them.

travel.title: Enchanted Gardens and Secret Paths
travel.desc: Yin Wood recharges in intimate, green, slightly magical places — gardens, vineyards, winding forest trails. You don't need vastness; you need beauty.

domestic.reason: Spanish moss, hidden gardens, and winding paths — pure Yin Wood energy in every square
Vineyards that grow beauty through patience — your spirit in landscape form
The city that lets you be weird, surrounded by lush green and creative energy

international.reason: Zen gardens, bamboo groves, and the art of finding beauty in small things — Yin Wood paradise
Rolling vineyards and olive groves where growth is slow, beautiful, and deeply satisfying
Tropical vines, rice terraces, and spiritual growth — Yin Wood's ultimate healing retreat

travel.avoid: Harsh, barren landscapes with no greenery — concrete jungles and frozen tundras drain Yin Wood fast.
travel.travel_tip: Visit a botanical garden in every city you travel to. Yin Wood recharges fastest around cultivated beauty.

yin_wood.final_message: The vine doesn't compete with the oak for height. It finds its own path to the sunlight — and so will you.

life_turning_point.title: When the Vine Finds Its Wall
life_turning_point.desc: Yin Wood's turning point comes when you find the right structure to grow on — a career, a partner, a mission that matches your shape perfectly.

periods.desc: You experiment with directions until you find the structure that fits your natural growth pattern.
Once attached to the right support, your growth accelerates beautifully. This is your blooming period.
You've covered the wall completely — your influence is everywhere, subtle but undeniable.
You've become inseparable from the structure you grew on — a permanent, beautiful part of the landscape.

life_turning_point.key_year: 2027 brings opportunities for Yin Wood to find powerful new support structures — say yes to the right one.

fengshui.title: A Cozy Green Haven
fengshui.desc: Yin Wood needs intimate, plant-filled spaces with soft curves and natural materials. Think cottage, not cathedral.

room_tips.tip: Trailing plants (pothos, string of pearls) that cascade from shelves — Yin Wood energy literally hanging in the air.
A small wooden desk near a window with climbing plants on the sill. Soft lighting, not harsh fluorescents.
Sage green walls, linen bedding, and a small plant on the nightstand. Soft, natural, alive.

fengshui.color_scheme: Sage green + soft cream + natural wood
fengshui.avoid: Sharp, angular modern design and all-metal/glass aesthetics clash with Yin Wood's organic energy.
fengshui.item: A trailing plant in a macramé hanger — the perfect symbol of Yin Wood's graceful, downward-flowing growth.

accessory.title: Delicate Charms for the Winding Vine
accessory.desc: Yin Wood thrives with Water energy accessories that feed growth, and subtle Wood pieces that affirm your nature.

recommendations.reason: Green patterns inside the stone look like tiny forests — a miniature ecosystem on your finger.
Silver's cooling Water energy feeds Yin Wood's growth through the Metal-generates-Water cycle.
Light green peridot carries spring energy — renewal, fresh starts, and gentle optimism.

accessory.avoid_material: Heavy, chunky metal pieces overwhelm Yin Wood's delicate energy. Keep it light.
accessory.tip: Layer delicate pieces rather than wearing one statement piece — it mirrors Yin Wood's nature of many small growths creating beauty.

scent.title: Garden After Rain — Fresh, Green, Alive
scent.desc: Yin Wood resonates with light, green, floral scents — the kind that make you think of hidden gardens at dawn.

recommendations.reason: Light, clean, and subtly energizing — green tea scent is Yin Wood distilled into fragrance.
Delicate, climbing jasmine is Yin Wood's flower. Its scent enhances your natural charm and adaptability.
Fresh fig leaves carry the scent of Mediterranean gardens — growth, warmth, and gentle sophistication.

scent.mood: Green tea for mornings, jasmine for evenings, fig leaf for creative work sessions.
scent.tip: Dab scent behind your ears — the warmth there releases fragrance gradually, matching Yin Wood's slow-reveal nature.

tough_love.title: You're So Bright That You Can't See Your Own Shadow
tough_love.desc: Yang Fire — the sun itself. You light up everything... including things people were keeping in the dark for good reason. Your honesty is refreshing until it's brutal. Your energy is amazing until it's exhausting. Not everything needs your spotlight.

encouragement.title: Without You, This World Would Be Pretty Cold and Dark
encouragement.desc: Here's what nobody tells the sun: thank you. Everyone takes your warmth for granted because it's always there. But you know what happens when you go down? Everything stops. Don't let anyone make you dim yourself — the world literally needs your light.

love.title: You Love Like the Sun Loves the Earth — Completely, Generously, and Sometimes Too Hot
love.desc: Yang Fire in love is passionate, generous, and all-in. You shower your partner with warmth and attention. But the sun that's too close burns. Give your partner space to have their own light. The best relationships have two suns, not a sun and a shadow.
love.ideal_partner: Someone bright enough not to be overwhelmed by your intensity — ideally a Water type who balances your heat
love.love_warning: You can't be someone's entire source of light. They need to shine on their own too.

wealth.title: Money Comes to You Like Moths to a Flame — But Does It Stay?
wealth.desc: Yang Fire attracts wealth through charisma and visibility. People want to invest in you, hire you, partner with you — because you're magnetic. The challenge isn't earning; it's keeping. Your generous nature and love of grand gestures can drain your accounts fast.
wealth.money_style: Magnetic earner, generous spender, needs discipline to retain wealth
wealth.wealth_tip: Automate your savings. Your willpower is better spent on creation than conservation.

career.title: Any Stage Is Your Stage — Find One Worth Standing On
career.desc: Yang Fire people don't just work in fields — they illuminate them. Whether it's a boardroom, a hospital, or a stage, you bring energy that transforms the space. Choose work that lets you shine and gives you an audience that benefits from your light.
career.work_style: High-energy performer who transforms any environment they enter

health.title: The Sun Doesn't Know It's Burning Itself — Check Your Heart
health.desc: Yang Fire governs the heart and cardiovascular system. Your boundless energy masks a body that runs hot — literally. High blood pressure, heart palpitations, and burnout are your biggest risks.
health.health_tip: Cool down daily — swimming, cold showers, or simply sitting still for 10 minutes. Your body runs hot; deliberately cool it.

relationships.title: Everyone Orbits You — But Who Are You Really Close To?
relationships.desc: You have a million acquaintances and maybe three real friends. The sun has many planets but few that actually sustain life. Invest in the few orbits that matter. Not every relationship needs to be a solar system.

travel.title: Bright, Warm Places Where the Sun Is Always Welcome
travel.desc: Yang Fire recharges under open skies, in vibrant cities, and anywhere energy is celebrated. You need heat, light, and the buzz of life.

domestic.reason: Sun, energy, nightlife, and a city that never apologizes for being extra — just like you
The city of lights. Every building is trying to out-shine the next. You'll feel right at home
Music, food, celebration, and soul — New Orleans matches Yang Fire's generous, expressive energy

international.reason: Mediterranean sun, flamboyant architecture, and a culture that celebrates living out loud
Carnival energy, beach culture, and warmth in every sense — Yang Fire heaven
Ambitious, flashy, and unapologetically grand — Dubai matches Yang Fire's scale

travel.avoid: Cold, dark, isolated places drain your fire fast. Long Scandinavian winters would literally depress you.
travel.travel_tip: Plan a sunrise activity at every destination. Yang Fire people recharge by greeting the sun — you're literally meeting your own element.

yang_fire.final_message: The world doesn't need you to dim. It needs you to burn responsibly — with purpose, with generosity, and with the awareness that even the sun takes a break at night.

life_turning_point.title: When the Spark Becomes a Blaze
life_turning_point.desc: Yang Fire builds slowly, then ignites spectacularly. Your turning points aren't subtle — they're visible to everyone.

periods.desc: Your talent catches fire publicly. A breakout moment — everyone sees you at once.
You learn to maintain your fire without burning out. Peak productivity and influence.
Your fire shifts from personal ambition to illuminating others. Mentoring and legacy-building.
The bonfire becomes a hearth — warm, steady, and the center of a grateful community.

life_turning_point.key_year: 2027 brings Fire-supporting energy — Yang Fire people should take their boldest swings this year.

fengshui.title: A Space That Glows
fengshui.desc: Yang Fire needs bright, warm, open spaces. Natural light is non-negotiable. South-facing rooms are ideal.

room_tips.tip: Warm lighting, south-facing windows, and warm-toned furniture. No cold fluorescents — ever.
Bright walls, good task lighting, and something red on the desk (a pen, a frame) to feed your fire.
Warm earth tones with red accents. Candles (safely placed) bring Fire energy even at night.

fengshui.color_scheme: Warm red + sunset orange + golden yellow
fengshui.avoid: Dark, north-facing rooms with poor lighting extinguish Yang Fire energy completely.
fengshui.item: A quality candle collection — fire in its most controlled, beautiful form.

accessory.title: Radiant Pieces for the Blazing Sun
accessory.desc: Yang Fire shines brightest with Wood (which feeds fire) and Earth (which fire produces) energy accessories.

recommendations.reason: Warm orange-red carnelian is the stone of motivation and leadership — pure Yang Fire fuel.
Gold channels the sun's energy directly. Yang Fire people wearing gold literally glow brighter.
Called the 'merchant's stone' — citrine channels Yang Fire's natural ability to attract success and wealth.

accessory.avoid_material: Black stones and heavy Water-energy pieces (obsidian, black tourmaline) can dampen your flame.
accessory.tip: Wear warm-toned metals (gold, rose gold) over cool ones (silver, platinum). Your element demands warmth.

scent.title: Bold, Warm, Impossible to Ignore
scent.desc: Yang Fire resonates with spicy, warm, resinous scents — the kind that fill a room the moment you walk in.

recommendations.reason: Rich, warm, and commanding — Oud matches Yang Fire's powerful presence and magnetic energy.
Warm spice that radiates heat and energy — cinnamon is Yang Fire condensed into scent.
Rare, golden, and luxurious — saffron matches Yang Fire's generous, spotlight-loving nature.

scent.mood: Oud for power moments, cinnamon for daily warmth, saffron for celebrations.
scent.tip: Apply generously — Yang Fire scents should announce you before you enter and linger after you leave.

tough_love.title: Your Intensity Is Beautiful — Until It Burns a Hole Through Everything
tough_love.desc: Yin Fire is a focused flame — a candle, a laser, a magnifying glass concentrating sunlight into a single point. That focus creates masterwork... and also creates anxiety, overthinking, and the inability to turn it off. You don't need to analyze every shadow.

encouragement.title: Quiet Flames Start the Biggest Revolutions
encouragement.desc: The sun gets all the credit, but it's the candle that guided people through the dark ages. Your light is intimate, focused, and precisely aimed. One candle can light a thousand others without losing its own flame — that's your power.

love.title: You Love with the Intensity of a Flame Held Dangerously Close
love.desc: Yin Fire in love is intense, devoted, and deeply focused on one person. You study your partner like a subject under a microscope — beautiful and slightly unnerving. You need someone who can handle being truly seen.
love.ideal_partner: Someone comfortable with emotional depth and intensity — an Earth type who absorbs your heat without cracking
love.love_warning: Intensity is romantic until it's surveillance. Trust your partner without needing to understand them completely.

wealth.title: You Don't Chase Money — You Attract It Through Mastery
wealth.desc: Yin Fire builds wealth through expertise and precision. You become the best at something specific, and money follows mastery. Your niche is your goldmine.
wealth.money_style: Expertise-based earner, niche specialist, values quality over quantity in investments
wealth.wealth_tip: Double down on your specialty. Generalists starve; specialists name their price.

career.title: Find Your Niche, Then Burn a Hole Through It
career.desc: Yin Fire doesn't spread — it focuses. Your career path isn't about climbing a ladder; it's about going deeper into one thing until you become the undisputed expert. The narrower your focus, the more valuable you become.
career.work_style: Deep specialist who becomes the definitive expert in their chosen niche

health.title: Your Mind Burns Hot — Watch Your Heart and Sleep
health.desc: Yin Fire governs the heart and pericardium. Your concentrated mental energy creates internal heat that disrupts sleep and raises anxiety. You think so hard it literally warms your body.
health.health_tip: Blue light filter glasses, meditation before bed, and absolutely no work in the bedroom. Your brain needs a 'lights off' signal.

relationships.title: You See Through Everyone — And It Makes Them Uncomfortable
relationships.desc: You notice everything — the micro-expression, the hesitation, the thing they didn't say. This makes you an incredible friend and a slightly terrifying one. Sometimes people just want to be accepted, not analyzed.

travel.title: Intimate, Historical, and Rich with Hidden Meaning
travel.desc: Yin Fire recharges in places with depth, history, and intimate scale. Grand tourist spots bore you — you want the hidden room, the secret garden, the locals-only bar.

domestic.reason: Candlelit history, hidden courtyards, and stories layered centuries deep
Ancient art, spiritual depth, and desert skies that make your inner fire feel at home
Mountain mysticism, craft culture, and a creative community that values depth over flash

international.reason: Candlelit streets, alchemist history, and a city that understands focused, intimate beauty
Ancient medinas, lantern-lit passages, and craft traditions preserved through focused dedication
Tea ceremony precision, temple gardens, and a culture that perfects the smallest details

travel.avoid: Loud, overstimulating party destinations drain Yin Fire fast. Vegas is your nightmare.
travel.travel_tip: Book the smallest, most intimate accommodation you can find. Yin Fire recharges in cozy spaces, not grand ones.

yin_fire.final_message: The candle that burns steadily outlasts the bonfire. Your quiet light is more powerful than you know.

life_turning_point.title: When the Candle Becomes a Laser
life_turning_point.desc: Yin Fire's turning points come from focus, not force. When your attention locks onto the right thing, your results are extraordinary.

periods.desc: You discover the thing worth dedicating your full attention to. Everything before this was rehearsal.
Deep expertise becomes undeniable. People start seeking you out specifically for what only you can do.
Your decades of focused work produce results that seem almost magical to outside observers.
Your steady flame becomes the light that guides the next generation of focused minds.

life_turning_point.key_year: 2027 rewards Yin Fire's patience — long-term projects reach critical breakthrough moments.

fengshui.title: A Cozy, Focused, Warm Cocoon
fengshui.desc: Yin Fire needs warm, intimate spaces with focused lighting. Think reading nook, not open concept.

room_tips.tip: Warm accent lighting — table lamps over overhead lights. Create pools of warm light, not uniform brightness.
A focused desk lamp (brass or copper) with warm light. Keep the rest of the room slightly dim to enhance concentration.
