Candlelight ambiance — salt lamp or warm LED candles. Deep burgundy or plum accents for Yin Fire warmth.

fengshui.color_scheme: Deep burgundy + warm copper + soft cream
fengshui.avoid: Harsh overhead lighting and bright, sterile white spaces scatter Yin Fire's focused energy.
fengshui.item: A brass or copper desk lamp — focused warm light is Yin Fire's element in object form.

accessory.title: Intimate Treasures for the Candlelight Soul
accessory.desc: Yin Fire resonates with warm, intimate accessories — small but meaningful pieces with depth.

recommendations.reason: Deep red garnet carries concentrated fire energy — passion, focus, and devotion in a small package.
Rose gold's warm pink tone matches Yin Fire's intimate warmth. A locket adds the personal touch you crave.
Small but powerful — rubies channel focused fire energy directly near your intuitive centers.

accessory.avoid_material: Large, flashy pieces overwhelm Yin Fire's intimate energy. Keep it small and meaningful.
accessory.tip: Choose one signature piece and wear it always — Yin Fire's power comes from consistency, not variety.

scent.title: Intimate, Warm, and Unforgettable Up Close
scent.desc: Yin Fire resonates with close-range scents — the kind you only smell when someone leans in. Intimate, warm, and slightly mysterious.

recommendations.reason: Rich, comforting, and intimate — vanilla is Yin Fire's signature scent of focused warmth.
Meditative and deep, sandalwood supports Yin Fire's contemplative nature and spiritual focus.
Not bright rose — dark, heavy, midnight rose. The scent of focused beauty that reveals itself slowly.

scent.mood: Sandalwood for focus work, vanilla for comfort, dark rose for meaningful evenings.
scent.tip: Apply scent to warm pulse points — inner wrists, behind ears. Yin Fire scents are meant to be discovered, not announced.

tough_love.title: You're So Reliable That People Have Stopped Asking If You're Okay
tough_love.desc: Everyone depends on the mountain — and the mountain never complains. But mountains have fault lines. Your reliability has become everyone's excuse to never check on you. When's the last time someone asked how YOU are without you immediately deflecting to someone else's problem?

encouragement.title: When Everything Falls Apart, You're Still Standing — That's Not Nothing
encouragement.desc: Markets crash. Relationships end. Plans fail. And there you are — unchanged, unmoved, still holding it together for everyone. That quiet, stubborn stability is the most underrated superpower in existence.

love.title: You Love Like a Mountain — Permanently, Protectively, and Sometimes Possessively
love.desc: Yang Earth in love is the partner who says 'I will be here no matter what' — and means it for the next 50 years. But your stability can become possessiveness, and your reliability can become predictability. Mountains don't move, but your partner might need to.
love.ideal_partner: Someone who appreciates your stability but brings movement and surprise — a Wood or Water type who keeps things dynamic
love.love_warning: Being dependable is your love language. But love also needs surprise, growth, and the willingness to change.

wealth.title: You Build Wealth Like You Build Everything — Brick by Brick, Unshakable
wealth.desc: Yang Earth wealth strategy is fundamentally about real assets — real estate, land, infrastructure. You don't gamble; you build. Your financial patience drives Wall Street types insane, but you'll still be standing when they've liquidated.
wealth.money_style: Real asset builder, hates speculation, patient compound growth strategy
wealth.wealth_tip: Trust your instinct for long-term value. The mountain doesn't chase trends; it IS the trend.

career.title: Build Something That Outlasts You
career.desc: Yang Earth doesn't want a job — you want a legacy. Institutions, infrastructure, systems that serve people for generations. Your ideal career involves building something permanent and then protecting it.
career.work_style: Institutional builder who creates permanent, stable structures

health.title: The Mountain Stores Everything — Including Stress
health.desc: Yang Earth governs the stomach and spleen. You absorb stress without showing it, but it accumulates in your digestive system. Bloating, weight gain, and chronic worry are your signals that the mountain is overloaded.
health.health_tip: Walk after meals — movement aids Earth-type digestion. And stop eating your feelings.

relationships.title: You're Everyone's Rock — Who's Yours?
relationships.desc: People call you for emergencies, for advice, for stability. But you've trained everyone so well to lean on you that nobody thinks to hold you up. The mountain needs its own foundation.

travel.title: Grand Landscapes That Match Your Scale
travel.desc: Yang Earth recharges in places that are massive, ancient, and grounded. Mountains, canyons, vast plains — landscapes that remind you of yourself.

domestic.reason: Geological time carved into stone — Yang Earth finds deep peace in landscapes measured in millions of years
Earth's raw power on display — geysers, hot springs, and the feeling of standing on something primordially alive
Standing stone monoliths in the desert — the visual definition of Yang Earth energy

international.reason: Ancient cave dwellings carved into earth — humanity living IN the mountain, not ON it
A civilization built to BE the mountain — Yang Earth's ultimate dream realized in stone
A sacred mountain in the desert — Yang Earth's spiritual mirror. You'll feel something words can't describe here

travel.avoid: Flat, feature-less places with no topography bore Yang Earth. Also avoid overly crowded tourist traps — you need space and scale.
travel.travel_tip: Hike to high points wherever you travel. Yang Earth people literally think more clearly at elevation.

yang_earth.final_message: Mountains don't prove themselves. They just exist — massive, ancient, and irreplaceable. That's what you are to the people who love you.

life_turning_point.title: When the Mountain Reveals What's Inside
life_turning_point.desc: Yang Earth's turning points are geological — slow builds that suddenly reveal massive internal treasures (like a mine opening).

periods.desc: You lay the foundation of your life's work. This period defines the next 30 years.
Your foundation supports rapid vertical growth. Career authority and financial stability hit new heights.
You reach your summit — maximum influence, maximum respect, maximum stability.
You become a landmark — the person everyone references as an example of what's possible through patience.

life_turning_point.key_year: 2028 brings Earth-supporting energy — major institutional and financial milestones for Yang Earth.

fengshui.title: A Grounded, Warm, Substantial Space
fengshui.desc: Yang Earth needs solid, warm spaces with natural stone, earth tones, and a sense of permanence. Nothing flimsy.

room_tips.tip: Stone accent wall or natural stone fireplace. Heavy wooden furniture that feels like it could last a century.
A massive wooden desk, stone paperweight, and earth-toned art. Your workspace should feel like a mountain command center.
Heavy bedframe (platform style), earthy brown and gold tones, weighted blankets for that grounded sleep.

fengshui.avoid: Lightweight, portable furniture and minimalist empty spaces make Yang Earth feel anxious.
fengshui.item: A large natural stone — river rock, crystal geode, or marble sphere. A literal piece of Earth in your space.

accessory.title: Substantial Pieces for the Mountain Soul
accessory.desc: Yang Earth thrives with Fire (which feeds Earth) and Metal (which Earth generates) energy accessories.

recommendations.reason: Golden-brown tiger's eye channels Yang Earth's warm authority and commands respect.
Heavy gold speaks Yang Earth's language — permanent, valuable, substantial.
Warm orange carnelian feeds Earth energy while adding a touch of motivation and warmth.

accessory.avoid_material: Lightweight, cheap-looking accessories clash with Yang Earth's substantial energy. Quality over quantity always.
accessory.tip: One statement piece that you wear for decades is more Yang Earth than a drawer full of trendy accessories.

scent.title: Deep, Grounded, Monumental
scent.desc: Yang Earth resonates with deep, earthy scents — vetiver, amber, stone-like minerality.

recommendations.reason: Literal earth in a bottle. Vetiver is the root of the grass — deep, grounding, permanent. Yang Earth's perfect scent.
Rich, deep earth energy that lasts all day — just like Yang Earth's enduring presence.
Fossilized tree resin — ancient, warm, and layered. Amber mirrors Yang Earth's depth and permanence.

scent.mood: Vetiver for authority, patchouli for grounding, amber for presence.
scent.tip: Apply to your neck — the warmth there releases earth scents slowly, matching your steady, enduring energy.

tough_love.title: You Take Care of Everyone Else Until There's Nothing Left of You
tough_love.desc: Yin Earth is the garden soil — you grow everything, nurture everyone, and give until you're depleted. But here's the hard truth: a garden with exhausted soil grows nothing. You're not being selfless; you're being unsustainable.

encouragement.title: Everything Beautiful Grows Because of You — Remember That
encouragement.desc: The flowers get the credit, but nothing grows without soil. Every success story around you has your fingerprints on it. People see the bloom; you ARE the reason it bloomed. That matters more than anyone will ever say out loud.

love.title: You Love by Nurturing — But Your Partner Isn't Your Child
love.desc: Yin Earth in love is the ultimate caretaker — remembering preferences, anticipating needs, always cooking something. But excessive nurturing can become suffocating. In Eastern metaphysics, you match best with Yang Wood energy — strong enough to receive your care and give back equally.
love.ideal_partner: Someone who receives your care with gratitude AND returns it — a two-way nurturing relationship, not one-directional
love.love_warning: You're their partner, not their parent. Stop raising your lovers.

wealth.title: The Garden Grows Wealth Quietly — Slow But Certain
wealth.desc: Yin Earth doesn't chase big scores — you accumulate through steady, small efforts. Your wealth often comes through people you've helped. The catch? You also lose money by being too generous. Lending money you can't afford to lose is your financial blind spot.
wealth.money_style: Steady accumulator, relationship-based income, generous to a fault
wealth.wealth_tip: Before lending money, ask yourself: 'Can I afford to give this as a gift?' If not, say no.

career.title: Growing People Is Your Superpower — Make It Your Career
career.desc: Yin Earth thrives in any role where you help others develop. Teaching, coaching, HR, therapy — you're the person who sees potential in everyone and knows exactly how to nurture it into reality.
career.work_style: Support-oriented developer who finds fulfillment in others' growth

health.title: The Gardener Forgets to Water Herself — Eat, Sleep, REST
health.desc: Yin Earth also governs the spleen and stomach. Your habit of caring for others before yourself creates irregular meals, chronic fatigue, and immune system crashes. You're the person who makes sure everyone else eats... and then forgets their own lunch.
health.health_tip: Feed yourself FIRST. Put on your own oxygen mask. Your caring for others is only as strong as your own health.

relationships.title: You're the Mom/Dad Friend in Every Group — But Who Parents You?
relationships.desc: In every friend group, you're the one who remembers, organizes, checks in, and holds it together. It's exhausting and often thankless. Find at least one relationship where YOU get to be the one who's taken care of.

travel.title: Warm, Nourishing Places with Great Food and Kind People
travel.desc: Yin Earth recharges in places that feel like home — warm, food-rich, and full of genuine human connection. Farm stays, food tours, and cozy villages are your happy place.

domestic.reason: Farm-to-table culture, maple syrup season, and a pace of life that lets Yin Earth breathe
Warm hospitality, incredible food, and a city that treats strangers like family
Wine country with farm stays, artisan food, and rolling hills that mirror Yin Earth's gentle contours

international.reason: Wineries, olive farms, and a culture that believes the table is where love happens — Yin Earth paradise
Street food, warm climate, and genuine kindness that fills Yin Earth's emotional cup
Pastoral farmland, gentle hills, and a pace of life that lets Yin Earth's nurturing energy regenerate

travel.avoid: Harsh deserts and extreme cold strip Yin Earth's moisture. Also avoid cutthroat cities where human warmth is hard to find.
travel.travel_tip: Visit a local farmers market at every destination. Yin Earth people heal fastest when touching things that grew from soil.

yin_earth.final_message: Every beautiful thing in this world grew from good soil. You ARE that soil — and the world is more beautiful because of you.

life_turning_point.title: When the Garden Finally Blooms for YOU
life_turning_point.desc: Yin Earth's turning points are gentle but unmistakable — like the first bloom after a long winter.

periods.desc: You discover your gift for developing others and find purpose in roles where caring IS the job.
Years of practical, grounded effort pay off. Financial stability and relational abundance arrive.
Material security frees you to pursue emotional and spiritual richness.
Everything around you flourishes because of your lifetime of nurturing. You see your legacy in living bloom.

life_turning_point.key_year: 2027 brings Yin Earth excellent harvest energy in both finances and relationships.

fengshui.title: A Living, Breathing, Growing Space
fengshui.desc: Yin Earth needs spaces full of living things — plants, herbs, natural materials, and warmth. Your space should feel like a garden.

room_tips.tip: Multiple small herb pots (basil, rosemary, lavender) — tending living things IS how Yin Earth meditates.
Yin Earth has a deep connection to kitchens. Warm lighting, wooden utensils, and a spice rack you actually use.
Earth tones (terracotta, beige, warm clay) with soft fabrics that feel like a hug.

fengshui.color_scheme: Warm beige + mustard yellow + sage green
fengshui.avoid: Cold, sterile, artificial spaces (all glass and steel minimalism) drain Yin Earth's warmth.
fengshui.item: A terrarium — a tiny ecosystem you nurture. The ultimate Yin Earth desk companion.

accessory.title: Nurturing Charms for the Garden Soul
accessory.desc: Yin Earth resonates with gentle, warm accessories — nothing harsh or angular.

recommendations.reason: Warm yellow jasper radiates nurturing, stable energy that strengthens Yin Earth's caring nature.
Soft pearl luster reflects Yin Earth's gentle wisdom and feminine/nurturing energy.
Love-energy pink tourmaline amplifies Yin Earth's generous heart and capacity for care.

accessory.avoid_material: Sharp-edged metal jewelry clashes with Yin Earth's soft energy. Round, smooth, organic shapes are best.
accessory.tip: Trust your gut when choosing gifts for others — Yin Earth has eerily accurate intuition about what people need.

scent.title: Warm, Nourishing, Like a Kitchen Full of Love
scent.desc: Yin Earth resonates with comforting, food-adjacent scents — warm, sweet, and grounding.

recommendations.reason: Warm, sweet, and comforting — tonka bean is the scent of Yin Earth's nurturing embrace.
The scent of sun-warmed fields and natural sweetness — pure Yin Earth energy.
Gentle, healing, and calming — chamomile mirrors Yin Earth's gift for making everything better.

scent.mood: Chamomile for calming moments, tonka bean for cozy evenings, honey & hay for grounding days.
scent.tip: Layer scent in your kitchen — Yin Earth's power center. Beeswax candles while cooking doubles your nurturing energy.

tough_love.title: Being Right All the Time Is Exhausting — For Everyone Around You
tough_love.desc: Yang Metal is the blade that cuts clean. You're decisive, correct, and absolutely certain. You're also terrifying. Your certainty leaves no room for other people's truths. The sword that only cuts never learns to build.

encouragement.title: In a World of Noise, Your Clarity Is a Gift — Don't Apologize for It
encouragement.desc: Everyone else is waffling, compromising, hedging. You? You see the truth and you say it. That's not cruelty — it's courage. The world needs people who cut through the nonsense, and that person is you.

love.title: You Love Fiercely — But Fierce Isn't Always What Your Partner Needs
love.desc: Yang Metal in love is loyal, protective, and all-or-nothing. You'll fight anyone who threatens your relationship. But sometimes your partner needs a hug, not a bodyguard. Your loyalty is your greatest romantic gift — just remember to wrap it in tenderness.
love.ideal_partner: Someone who isn't intimidated by your intensity — a Water type who absorbs your edge and softens you
love.love_warning: Protect your relationship, not just your partner. Sometimes the threat isn't external.

wealth.title: You Earn Like You Fight — Decisively and Without Mercy
wealth.desc: Yang Metal doesn't negotiate — you decide what you're worth and that's the price. Your wealth comes from decisiveness and competitive instinct. You excel in high-stakes environments where courage is rewarded.
wealth.money_style: High-stakes earner, competitive investor, decisive financial moves
wealth.wealth_tip: Your instinct for the kill is an asset in business — but mercy in victory creates allies for the next battle.

career.title: Where Justice and Power Intersect — That's Your Battlefield
career.desc: Yang Metal is drawn to any field where decisive action creates justice or order. You need a career with stakes — where your ability to cut through chaos literally saves something or someone.
career.work_style: Decisive executor who thrives in high-pressure, high-stakes environments

health.title: The Blade Is Hard But Brittle — Watch Your Lungs and Bones
health.desc: Metal governs lungs and large intestine. Yang Metal types run rigid — physically and emotionally. Respiratory issues, bone density concerns, and chronic tension in the shoulders and neck are your warning signals.
health.health_tip: Martial arts training channels Yang Metal energy perfectly — structured, powerful, and physically demanding.

relationships.title: People Respect You. But Do They Like You?
relationships.desc: There's a difference between people who follow you because they have to and people who follow you because they want to. Yang Metal commands respect effortlessly — but warmth requires effort. Invest in being approachable.

travel.title: Places Forged in Power — Battlefields, Mountains, and Sacred Sites of Strength
travel.desc: Yang Metal recharges in places with warrior energy — historical battlefields, mountain peaks, and sites where human courage was tested.

domestic.reason: Walk where decisive courage changed history — Yang Metal's energy resonates in every field and monument
Discipline, honor, duty — the physical embodiment of Yang Metal values
Hard, ancient stone at altitude — Yang Metal finds clarity and strength in thin air and solid rock

international.reason: Where 300 warriors held the line — the ultimate Yang Metal pilgrimage site
Bushido code, sword culture, and disciplined warrior aesthetics speak directly to Yang Metal's soul
Rugged, fierce, and beautiful in a brutal way — Highland energy matches Yang Metal's raw, unapologetic strength

travel.avoid: Soft, cushy resort destinations with no edge or challenge bore Yang Metal to tears.
travel.travel_tip: Include a physical challenge at every destination — a difficult hike, a martial arts class, a shooting range. Yang Metal needs to be tested.

yang_metal.final_message: The sword that's never sheathed is dangerous. The sword that knows when to rest? That's a master's weapon. Learn to rest.

life_turning_point.title: When Raw Iron Becomes Tempered Steel
life_turning_point.desc: Yang Metal's turning points involve tempering — the process of heating and cooling that transforms raw iron into unbreakable steel.

periods.desc: A major challenge tests your resolve. What doesn't break you here makes you permanently stronger.
Your decisiveness becomes your trademark. Career authority crystallizes around your ability to cut through problems.
You know when to cut and when to sheathe — this wisdom makes you more powerful than raw force ever could.
Your strength becomes legacy. The blade at rest, honored and respected for all the battles it won.

life_turning_point.key_year: 2027-2028 tests Yang Metal's discipline — those who stay tempered will emerge with permanent new authority.

fengshui.title: Clean, Sharp, Powerful
fengshui.desc: Yang Metal needs clean lines, quality materials, and spaces that feel powerful without being cluttered.

room_tips.tip: Clean lines, quality leather or steel accents. One statement art piece — a sword, a sculpture, something with edge.
Organized to military precision. Metal desk accessories, sharp lighting, zero clutter. Your space reflects your mind.
Cool colors (white, silver, black), crisp linens, minimalist design. Yang Metal sleeps best in spaces with no visual noise.

fengshui.color_scheme: Silver + black + pure white + touch of gold
fengshui.avoid: Cluttered, chaotic, or overly colorful spaces scatter Yang Metal's focused energy.
fengshui.item: A quality blade display — a letter opener, a chef's knife, or a decorative sword. The symbol of your element, displayed with respect.

accessory.title: Powerful Pieces for the Warrior Soul
accessory.desc: Yang Metal resonates with strong, clean accessories — quality over everything.

recommendations.reason: Black onyx absorbs negativity and projects authority — the Yang Metal signature stone.
Precision engineering on your wrist. Yang Metal people and quality timepieces are a natural match.
Literal iron ore — hematite grounds Yang Metal's warrior energy and provides protective shielding.

accessory.avoid_material: Fragile, delicate jewelry that breaks easily insults Yang Metal's sense of durability.
accessory.tip: Buy one premium accessory rather than five cheap ones. Yang Metal respects quality that lasts.

scent.title: Clean, Sharp, Commanding
scent.desc: Yang Metal resonates with clean, sharp, metallic-edged scents that project authority.

recommendations.reason: Clean bergamot with a metallic edge — the scent equivalent of a freshly drawn blade.
Sharp, warm, and decisive — black pepper scent mirrors Yang Metal's direct, no-nonsense energy.
Treated hide — something natural that's been processed into something stronger. Yang Metal's story in scent form.

scent.mood: Black pepper for competition days, leather for leadership moments, bergamot & steel for everyday authority.
scent.tip: Apply to your neck and chest — Yang Metal scents should project forward like you do.

tough_love.title: Your Standards Are So High That Nothing — Including Yourself — Can Meet Them
tough_love.desc: Yin Metal is a beautiful, flawless gem — and that's the problem. You hold yourself and everything around you to standards that are almost impossibly high. The result? Chronic disappointment, stalled projects waiting for 'perfect,' and relationships that die from a thousand cuts of criticism.

encouragement.title: In a World of Mediocrity, Your Insistence on Excellence Is Revolutionary
encouragement.desc: Everyone else has accepted 'good enough.' You haven't, and you never will. That's not a flaw — that's a superpower. The world's most beautiful things were made by people who refused to settle. You're one of those people.

love.title: You Love Beautifully — But Nobody Can Be Beautiful Enough for Your Standards
love.desc: Yin Metal in love is devoted, elegant, and incredibly attentive to details. You remember everything — the good and the bad. Your love is refined and precious, but your critical eye can make your partner feel like they're always being graded.
love.ideal_partner: Someone authentic enough to not care about your standards, and warm enough to melt your perfectionism — a Fire type
love.love_warning: Love the person, not the idea of the person. Imperfection IS the human experience.

wealth.title: You Build Wealth Through Mastery of the Beautiful and the Precise
wealth.desc: Yin Metal's wealth comes from aesthetic expertise and precision. You know quality like a sommelier knows wine. When you leverage your discerning taste, money follows.
wealth.money_style: Quality-based earning, aesthetic expertise, premium positioning
wealth.wealth_tip: Your taste is a financial asset. Consult on quality, curate luxury, or create premium products.

career.title: Anywhere Precision and Beauty Intersect — That's Your Domain
career.desc: Yin Metal excels wherever quality matters more than quantity. You're the person organizations call when the standard needs to be exceptional.
career.work_style: Quality-obsessed specialist who elevates standards wherever they go

health.title: Perfectionism Is Literally Making You Sick — Breathe
health.desc: Yin Metal governs the lungs and skin. Your perfectionism manifests physically as shallow breathing, skin sensitivities, and tension headaches. When you can't control your external environment, your body starts rebelling.
health.health_tip: Skincare rituals are medicine for Yin Metal — the act of carefully tending your own body channels your perfectionism productively.

relationships.title: Your Taste Is Exquisite — But People Aren't Jewelry
relationships.desc: You curate your friend group like a jewelry collection — only the finest pieces. But human beings aren't gems. They have cracks, flaws, and rough edges. Sometimes the most valuable relationships are with people who are beautifully imperfect.

travel.title: Refined, Curated, Beautiful — No Tourist Traps
travel.desc: Yin Metal recharges in places of refined beauty — art cities, luxury retreats, and destinations where quality is a way of life.

domestic.reason: Fine wine, beautiful architecture, and an environment where quality is the baseline expectation
Chelsea galleries, MoMA, and a city that takes aesthetic excellence seriously
Luxury mountain beauty — where even the air feels curated

international.reason: Renaissance mastery in every building, painting, and piazza — Yin Metal's spiritual home
Swiss precision, watchmaking heritage, and clean beauty that Yin Metal deeply appreciates
Japanese attention to detail elevated to art form — packaging, food presentation, service perfection

travel.avoid: Budget hostels, loud party destinations, and anywhere 'rustic' means 'unkept.' Your energy depletes around carelessness.
travel.travel_tip: Splurge on one exceptional experience per trip rather than many mediocre ones. Quality resonates with your soul.

yin_metal.final_message: The gem that tries to be flawless is beautiful. The gem that embraces its unique inclusions? That's priceless.

life_turning_point.title: When the Raw Stone Gets Its Perfect Cut
life_turning_point.desc: Yin Metal's turning points come through refinement — each one polishes you closer to your truest, most brilliant form.

periods.desc: You discover what makes your particular brilliance unique — your niche, your aesthetic, your standard.
Relentless refinement of your craft produces work that's undeniably excellent. Recognition follows.
You reach the level of mastery where your taste and precision become industry benchmarks.
You become the standard — the gem against which all others are measured. Legacy through excellence.

life_turning_point.key_year: 2027-2028 rewards Yin Metal's patient refinement — expect breakthrough recognition of your quality.

fengshui.title: A Refined, Beautiful, Precisely Curated Space
fengshui.desc: Yin Metal needs clean, beautiful spaces where every item is carefully chosen and nothing is there by accident.

room_tips.tip: A few perfectly chosen art pieces, fresh flowers in a quality vase, and nothing that doesn't earn its place.
Minimalist desk with one beautiful pen, a quality notebook, and excellent lighting. Every object should be the best version of itself.
High thread-count linens (white or silver), a signature scent diffuser, and nothing cluttering the nightstand.

fengshui.color_scheme: Pearl white + silver + touches of blush pink
fengshui.avoid: Visual clutter, cheap materials, and anything faded or worn. Yin Metal physically flinches at low quality.
fengshui.item: A single perfect crystal — clear quartz, diamond, or high-quality glass prism. The purest form of Yin Metal energy.

accessory.title: Exquisite Pieces for the Jewel Soul
accessory.desc: Yin Metal IS jewelry energy — your accessories should reflect the finest version of yourself.

recommendations.reason: The hardest, clearest, most refined stone in existence. Diamonds ARE Yin Metal in mineral form.
Rarer and more refined than gold, platinum speaks Yin Metal's language of understated luxury.
Soft, pearlescent glow that changes with the light — moonstone mirrors Yin Metal's refined, shifting brilliance.

accessory.avoid_material: Costume jewelry and plated metals are physically painful for Yin Metal. If you can't afford real, wear nothing.
accessory.tip: One perfect piece beats ten good ones. Yin Metal's style philosophy in five words: less, but incredibly better.

scent.title: Clean, Refined, Subtly Unforgettable
scent.desc: Yin Metal resonates with clean, refined scents — the kind that make people lean in closer to identify.

recommendations.reason: Clean, subtle, refined — white tea scent is Yin Metal elegance in its purest aromatic form.
Often called the 'cashmere of perfumery' — iris is expensive, subtle, and unmistakably refined.
Clean bark and pale wood — silver birch carries the purity and natural elegance that defines Yin Metal.

scent.mood: White tea for daytime elegance, iris for formal occasions, silver birch for creative clarity.
scent.tip: Less is more. A single spray, applied to skin, not clothing — let people discover your scent by getting closer.

tough_love.title: Your Depth Impresses People — But Your Aimlessness Worries Them
tough_love.desc: The ocean is vast and impressive. It's also directionless. You can think about everything, analyze anything, and navigate any complexity — but where are you actually GOING? Wisdom without direction is just overthinking with a prettier name.

encouragement.title: Your Ability to See the Whole Picture Is Rarer Than You Think
encouragement.desc: While everyone else is arguing about drops, you see the entire ocean. Your strategic vision and emotional depth are a combination most people can't even imagine, let alone possess. When you finally choose a direction, you're unstoppable.

love.title: You Love Like the Ocean — Deep, Encompassing, and a Little Overwhelming
love.desc: Yang Water in love is profound, intuitive, and emotionally vast. You sense your partner's needs before they're spoken. But your depth can be intimidating — not everyone wants to swim in the deep end all the time.
love.ideal_partner: Someone who enjoys depth without drowning in it — an Earth type who grounds your waves and enjoys your vastness
love.love_warning: Not everyone wants to go deep every conversation. Sometimes 'how was your day?' is enough.

wealth.title: Money Flows to You and Through You — Learn to Build Dams
wealth.desc: Yang Water people attract money through wisdom and strategic vision. But like water, money flows easily in AND out. Your challenge isn't earning — it's retaining. Build financial structures (savings, investments) that hold your wealth in place.
wealth.money_style: Strategic earner with poor retention, needs automated savings systems
wealth.wealth_tip: Build 'financial dams' — automatic transfers to accounts you can't easily access. Your natural flow needs artificial banks.

career.title: Navigate Complexity That Makes Others Drown
career.desc: Yang Water excels in roles that require navigating vast, complex systems — global logistics, intelligence, geopolitics, deep research. Where others see chaos, you see currents you can ride.
career.work_style: Strategic navigator who thrives in vast, complex, uncertain environments

health.title: The Ocean Stores Everything — Including Toxins
health.desc: Yang Water governs kidneys and the urinary system. Your body stores toxins the way the ocean stores pollutants — invisibly, until the concentration becomes dangerous. Hydration, kidney health, and regular detoxification are essential.
health.health_tip: Drink more water (ironic but essential), swim regularly, and get your kidneys checked annually.

relationships.title: Everyone Thinks They Know You — Nobody Actually Does
relationships.desc: You show people different depths depending on the relationship. Your surface friends see calm waters. Your close friends know there's an ocean underneath. But even your closest people might not know what's at your deepest floor. Let someone all the way in.

travel.title: Vast, Mysterious, Water-Connected Destinations
travel.desc: Yang Water recharges near or on large bodies of water — oceans, vast lakes, and places where water dominates the landscape.

domestic.reason: Where the Pacific Ocean meets dramatic cliffs — Yang Water's vastness reflected in landscape form
The largest freshwater lake on Earth — cold, deep, and powerful like Yang Water itself
Where ocean and land constantly negotiate — the dynamic energy Yang Water thrives in

international.reason: Deep, ancient waterways carved through mountains — geological Yang Water energy at its most dramatic
Life literally built on the ocean — the closest you can get to living in your element
Glaciers, hot springs, and waterfalls — all three states of water in one island. Yang Water's dream destination

travel.avoid: Dry, landlocked, desert environments with no water. Extended time away from water literally depletes your energy.
travel.travel_tip: Always book accommodation with a water view. Yang Water people sleep better, think clearer, and recharge faster near water.

yang_water.final_message: The ocean doesn't need to prove how deep it is. Neither do you. Just keep flowing — the right shores will find you.

life_turning_point.title: When the River Reaches the Sea
life_turning_point.desc: Yang Water's turning points are about finding the right ocean to pour into — the mission, relationship, or life's work vast enough to contain you.

periods.desc: You stop wandering and catch a current — a career direction or life purpose that finally makes sense.
Your accumulated wisdom finds a channel. Massive momentum builds as your experience flows in one direction.
You've reached your full vastness. Your influence spreads in every direction simultaneously.
You become the elder sage — the person whose wisdom is so vast it simply can't be measured anymore.

life_turning_point.key_year: 2027-2028 flows Yang Water toward major strategic opportunities — ride the current.

fengshui.title: A Space That Flows Like Water
fengshui.desc: Yang Water needs open, flowing spaces — nothing blocky or rigid. Water features, blue tones, and curved furniture.

room_tips.tip: A water feature — tabletop fountain, fish tank, or even a large bowl of water with floating candles.
Ocean-view if possible. If not, a large photograph of the sea. Deep blue accents and flowing curtains.
Deep navy blue or ocean teal bedding. White noise machine with water sounds. Cool temperature.

fengshui.avoid: Boxy, rigid furniture and warm colors (orange, red) create Fire energy that directly opposes Yang Water.
fengshui.item: A tabletop fountain — moving water energy in your space is Yang Water's most powerful feng shui tool.

accessory.title: Deep, Mysterious Pieces for the Ocean Soul
accessory.desc: Yang Water resonates with deep blue, mysterious, water-connected accessories.

recommendations.reason: Deep blue lapis carries ancient wisdom energy — the stone of pharaohs and ocean depths.
Silver's cool, reflective quality channels water's mirror-like wisdom.
Deep blue sapphire captures the ocean's vast depth and clarity — Yang Water's signature gem.

accessory.avoid_material: Warm-toned metals and red/orange stones create uncomfortable Fire energy that fights your Water nature.
accessory.tip: Wear accessories that catch the light and shift color — water is never one color, and neither should your gems be.

scent.title: Deep, Aquatic, Mysteriously Alluring
scent.desc: Yang Water resonates with aquatic, marine, and mysteriously deep scents.

recommendations.reason: The scent of ocean wind carrying stories from distant shores — pure Yang Water energy.
Legendary ocean perfume ingredient — mysterious, deep, and impossible to replicate. Like you.
Sacred water flower — blue lotus carries spiritual depth and oceanic calm.

scent.mood: Sea salt for everyday depth, ambergris for powerful occasions, blue lotus for spiritual moments.
scent.tip: Spray scent in your hair — it releases gradually as you move, creating an 'ocean breeze' effect wherever you go.

tough_love.title: You Feel Everything — And It's Destroying You Because You Won't Set Boundaries
tough_love.desc: Yin Water is morning dew — absorbing every emotional vibration in the environment. Beautiful? Yes. Sustainable? Not when you're soaking up everyone else's pain without a filter. You're not a sponge; you're a person. Start acting like one.

encouragement.title: Your Ability to Sense What Others Can't See Is Your Superpower — Own It
encouragement.desc: You walk into a room and immediately know who's hurting, who's lying, who needs help, and who needs space. That's not weakness — that's a power most people would kill for. The world needs your sensitivity. Just make sure it doesn't consume you.

love.title: You Love Like Morning Dew — Tender, Nourishing, and Easily Evaporated
love.desc: Yin Water in love is the most tender, intuitive, emotionally attuned partner imaginable. You sense what your partner needs before they know it themselves. But dew evaporates under too much heat. You need someone who protects your sensitivity, not exploits it.
love.ideal_partner: Someone who treasures your sensitivity and provides emotional shelter — a Metal type who structures your emotional world
love.love_warning: Not everyone deserves access to your emotional depth. Guard your dew — some people will just evaporate it.

wealth.title: Money Is Complicated for You Because You'd Rather Give It Away
wealth.desc: Yin Water's relationship with money is emotional, not logical. You spend on others, give when you can't afford it, and undercharge for your worth because you feel guilty making money from your gifts. Your intuition COULD make you wealthy — if you'd stop undervaluing yourself.
wealth.money_style: Intuitive earner, chronic undercharger, generous to depletion
wealth.wealth_tip: Your emotional gifts have real market value. Charge what you're worth. Generosity without self-preservation is just slow self-destruction.

career.title: Your Gift Is Feeling What Others Can't — Make It Your Livelihood
career.desc: Yin Water thrives in careers that require emotional perception — therapy, counseling, healing, writing. You read humans like books. The key is finding a role that values this while protecting your energy.
career.work_style: Emotionally intuitive connector who thrives in deep, one-on-one relationships

health.title: You Absorb Everyone's Stress — And Your Body Pays for It
health.desc: Yin Water governs the kidneys and reproductive system. Your body absorbs emotional toxins like a filter — headaches after difficult conversations, fatigue after social events, mysterious aches that correspond to other people's problems.
health.health_tip: Epsom salt baths are Yin Water's medicine — literally soak in water to release what you've absorbed from others.

relationships.title: You Read People So Well That They Can't Hide — And It Scares Them
relationships.desc: Your emotional perception is so accurate it's almost supernatural. Some people love being truly seen. Others find it deeply uncomfortable. Learn to soften your perceptions — not everyone is ready to hear what you know about them.

travel.title: Mystical, Misty, Spiritually Rich Destinations
travel.desc: Yin Water recharges in places with mist, gentle water, spiritual energy, and a touch of mystery. You don't need excitement — you need soul.

domestic.reason: Spiritual vortexes and red rocks — Yin Water's intuitive energy amplifies dramatically in Sedona's charged landscape
Fog, rain, ancient forests, and the sound of waves on stone — Yin Water's most natural habitat
Misty shores, empty beaches, and the gentle melancholy that Yin Water transforms into beauty

international.reason: Mist, green, Celtic mysticism, and an island that breathes the same way Yin Water does
Tropical rainforest, spiritual healing centers, and water temples that speak directly to Yin Water's soul
Hot springs under the aurora borealis — mystical water energy in its most magical form

travel.avoid: Hot, dry deserts and intense party destinations. Dew evaporates in heat, and so does your energy.
travel.travel_tip: Schedule a meditation or spiritual practice at every destination. Yin Water recharges deepest in stillness and sacred spaces.

yin_water.final_message: After the rain stops, the rainbow appears. Behind every tear you've shed, a more beautiful tomorrow is waiting.

life_turning_point.title: When Raindrops Become a River
life_turning_point.desc: Yin Water starts small — a single drop. But drops accumulate into streams, streams into rivers. Your turning points come from quiet accumulation reaching critical mass.

periods.desc: Your emotional gifts are recognized and valued. You become a key person in others' lives.
Intuition and insight merge into a unique wisdom that people actively seek out.
Years of quiet flow converge into powerful momentum toward your deepest goals.
You become the gentle rain that nourishes everything around you — a source of life for your entire community.

life_turning_point.key_year: 2027-2028 brings Yin Water a year when emotion and wisdom shine brightest — trust your feelings.

fengshui.title: A Dewy, Sensory, Healing Space
fengshui.desc: Yin Water needs moisture, softness, and gentle sensory engagement. Your space should feel like being enveloped in morning mist.

room_tips.tip: Humidifier or mist diffuser — Yin Water's enemy is dryness. Keep the air moisture balanced at all times.
Watercolor supplies or creative tools nearby — Yin Water's creativity flows best when creative tools are within arm's reach.
Wave-pattern fabrics in aqua-mint tones, soft lighting, and the sound of gentle rain playing as you fall asleep.

fengshui.avoid: Excessive heating and Fire-heavy decor (lots of red, candles, direct sunlight) evaporate Yin Water's moisture energy.
fengshui.item: An essential oil diffuser — distributing gentle moisture throughout your space is Yin Water's perfect feng shui hack.

accessory.title: Crystal-Clear Charms for the Morning Dew
accessory.desc: Yin Water resonates with clear, luminous, water-connected gemstones and gentle metals.

recommendations.reason: Clear ocean-blue aquamarine amplifies Yin Water's pure, transparent charm and intuitive power.
Metal generates Water — delicate silver continuously feeds Yin Water's gentle energy.
Color-shifting opal mirrors Yin Water's adaptable, ever-changing nature — never the same twice.

accessory.avoid_material: Heavy, chunky accessories clash with Yin Water's light, delicate energy. Think dewdrop, not boulder.
accessory.tip: Wear a thin cool-toned bracelet on your wrist — Yin Water's sensory energy channels through the wrists.

scent.title: Fresh, Clear, Like a Misty Morning
scent.desc: Yin Water resonates with clean, fresh, transparent scents — the kind that smell like rain on petals.

recommendations.reason: Morning dew on delicate flowers — this scent IS Yin Water's emotional signature.
Soft, dewy, and nurturing — peony carries the same gentle caring energy as Yin Water.
The scent of rain itself. Yin Water's essence captured in aromatic form. Nothing is more you than this.

scent.mood: Lily of the valley for spring/summer freshness, peony for warm comfort, petrichor for reconnecting with your nature.
scent.tip: Mist perfume through your hair — it releases gradually as you move, creating the 'just walked through morning mist' effect.

INTJ.style: The strategic lover. You approach romance with the same analytical mind you bring to everything else. Expressing feelings is awkward, but once committed, you're in it for life.
INTJ.turn_on: Someone who matches you intellectually and can hold a conversation at your level
INTJ.turn_off: Emotional demands without logic, clinginess, and drama for its own sake

INTP.style: The observer-lover. When someone catches your eye, you study them from a distance for weeks before making any move. Confession comes late — but it's been thoroughly analyzed.
INTP.turn_on: Unique thinkers with original perspectives that surprise you
INTP.turn_off: People who lead with emotion and refuse to engage with logic

ENTJ.style: The direct-approach lover. Playing games is a waste of time — you go straight for what you want. You expect growth from your partner and offer the same in return.
ENTJ.turn_on: Ambitious people who are excellent in their own domain
ENTJ.turn_off: People without direction who just coast through life

ENTP.style: The debate-flirt. Romance is a game of wits, and you're a master player. Boredom is the enemy, so you're always looking for new intellectual sparks.
ENTP.turn_on: Quick-witted people who can spar with you verbally and hold their own
ENTP.turn_off: Rigid thinkers who resist change and can't take a joke

INFJ.style: The soul-seeker. Surface-level dating bores you — you want a connection that touches something deeper. Once you find it, your devotion is absolute.
INFJ.turn_on: Authentic souls with genuine depth and inner richness
INFJ.turn_off: Fake people who perform emotions instead of feeling them

INFP.style: The romantic dreamer. Your ideal relationship exists in your imagination first — beautifully, impossibly perfect. The real challenge is letting reality be enough.
INFP.turn_on: Artistic souls with warm hearts and the patience to understand your inner world
INFP.turn_off: People who dismiss emotions and only care about practical reality

ENFJ.style: The growth partner. You fall in love with someone's potential and dedicate yourself to helping them become their best. Devoted — but can cross into controlling.
ENFJ.turn_on: People with growth mindsets who appreciate your investment in them
ENFJ.turn_off: Self-centered people who take your efforts for granted

ENFP.style: The love enthusiast. Every new connection feels like destiny. You fall fast and hard, but once the relationship deepens, you're surprisingly committed.
ENFP.turn_on: Adventurous, energetic people who are open to new experiences
ENFP.turn_off: Cynical, negative people who shoot down every idea

ISTJ.style: The actions-speak-louder lover. You prove love through reliability, not words. Promises are sacred, and stability is the foundation of romance.
ISTJ.turn_on: Responsible, dependable people who keep their word
ISTJ.turn_off: Flaky, impulsive people who treat plans as suggestions

ISFJ.style: The silent devotee. You memorize your partner's habits, preferences, and comfort needs. Love is expressed through a thousand small, thoughtful gestures.
ISFJ.turn_on: Warm people who notice and appreciate your quiet acts of service
ISFJ.turn_off: Emotionally cold or dismissive people who don't acknowledge your efforts

ESTJ.style: The principled dater. Even romance has rules — planned dates, clear expectations, and mutual respect for commitments.
ESTJ.turn_on: Accomplished, socially respected people who match your standards
ESTJ.turn_off: Irresponsible people who waste time and break promises

ESFJ.style: The love-giver. Making your partner happy IS your happiness. You're highly attuned to their mood and care deeply about how others see your relationship.
ESFJ.turn_on: Social, family-oriented people who value relationships and community
ESFJ.turn_off: Rude, socially unaware people who embarrass you in public

ISTP.style: The cool independent. You need your own space and hate being smothered. Your love shows up in actions — fixing things, showing up when it matters, not in flowery words.
ISTP.turn_on: Independent people with their own passions and hobbies
ISTP.turn_off: Clingy partners who need 24/7 contact and constant reassurance

ISFP.style: The sensory romantic. You love through experiences — shared sunsets, great meals, beautiful music. Words aren't your thing; the vibe says it all.
ISFP.turn_on: Aesthetically aware people who enjoy sharing beautiful moments
ISFP.turn_off: Efficiency-obsessed people with zero appreciation for beauty or mood

ESTP.style: The thrill-seeking lover. You want excitement, spontaneity, and a partner who's down for anything. When things get boring, you start looking for the next adventure.
ESTP.turn_on: High-energy people who are ready for any adventure
ESTP.turn_off: Timid, risk-averse people who always say no to new experiences

ESFP.style: The party-date specialist. Life is a stage and love is the best show. You bring fun, laughter, and unforgettable moments to every relationship.
ESFP.turn_on: Funny, life-loving people who know how to have a good time
ESFP.turn_off: Serious, lecturing types who suck the fun out of everything
